name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Just Did IT Again
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=face_off_with_walz&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Walz just did it again. He announced he will extend his Unilateral Emergency Powers for a 15th time! This fight we've taken on to End Walz' Emergency Powers is exhausting. It sometimes makes you think you are nuts for doing it. But when things get tough and the battle drags on, I remember one of my favorite quotes from an important Founder... **It does not take a majority to prevail... but rather an irate, tireless minority, keen on setting brushfires of freedom in the minds of men.** These prophetic words by Samuel Adams are what fuels my tireless fire in this battle for our natural rights. Rights that were so clearly violated by Governor Walz and supported by a majority of our fellow Minnesotans. Even at the time of our country's founding, a majority of colonists did not support our struggle for independence. Choosing the security of a tyrannical, foreign crown, they did not join Samuel Adams in his resistance movement. But that irate, tireless minority prevailed and gave us the greatest country to ever populate this planet. Although I feel we are losing that country at a rapid pace these days. So it's up to us to save it! **Governor Walz is extending his Emergency Powers despite no emergency or even large scale cases of COVID. With the stroke of a pen, Walz has essentially eliminated our Constitutional Republic.** We're learning every day that [Governor Walz used lies and misinformation by Fauci](https://www.action4liberty.com/the_liars_and_their_destruction?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=face_off_with_walz&n=2) and the fraudulent government health bureaucracy to strip us of our rights and treat us like his subjects.
## It appears he wants his Emergency Powers now to be PERMANENT!!!
There's only one way to STOP Walz and the MN Dept of Health, and that's by pressuring Senate Republicans to REFUSE to pass a budget until the **Never Again Bill** is signed into law. They finally have leverage over the Governor. His government agencies only get funded if the Republican controlled Senate passes it. Time is running out though. The legislature shows back up to the Capitol on Monday and has only 16 days before a government shutdown. Pressure to compromise will be intense. But we CAN'T AFFORD COMPROMISE. We MUST keep our pressure campaign of door knocks, phone calls and digital ads up, in order to STOP a budget deal before the **Never Again Bill** is signed into law. **Please help us immediately. We're on the goal line and are the closest we've been to Ending Walz' Emergency Powers since the start. Help us win!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=face_off_with_walz&n=3 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=face_off_with_walz&n=4)
---
If we want to protect liberty for the next generation, we can't afford to lose this battle. Weak Republicans Senators won't do this by themselves. They need to feel the heat.
I fear that if we can't fund this pressure campaign for the next couple weeks, we won't be able to stop Walz from making his powers permanent. Can you imagine anything worse than that?
_Time is running out. Please help support the dooknocking, phone calling and digital ad campaigns that we use to bring the heat on politicians in St Paul._
[**Peter, don't let Governor Walz hold onto his Unilateral Emergency Powers any longer! Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to keep the pressure on Gazelka and Senate Republicans.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=face_off_with_walz&n=5)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=face_off_with_walz&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=face_off_with_walz&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=face_off_with_walz&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: No more negotiating. No more delays.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, in a few moments, [**I am going to ask you to make a contribution toward our fight in Congress to go bigger, bolder, and faster so Democrats deliver for the people that delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210610?refcode=em20210610-361&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=361_420207_DiNpHo&akid=361%2E420207%2EDiNpHo) But first, I wanted to explain why this work is so important.
On Tuesday, infrastructure talks between President Biden and a group of Republicans led by West Virginia Senator Shelley Moore Capito collapsed. I wish I could say I was surprised, but I'm not.
Earlier this spring, zero Republican senators voted for the American Rescue Plan — not even one. Five weeks ago, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell stated that 100% of his focus was stopping the Biden administration. Three weeks ago, the GOP delivered their first counteroffer on President Biden's sweeping and necessary infrastructure plan — _it was an embarrassing counter, just 10% of the President's total proposal._
And as I told Rachel Maddow earlier this week, it is once again very clear that Republicans do not want to come along. That is why I'm concerned that we're now negotiating with a _different_ group of Republican senators — hoping to magically get a deal that meets the scale of the crises we face. Look: we can wait another week, we can negotiate with another Republican senator or two — but the results won't be any different. **Republicans have no interest in doing anything that the people desperately need or want. Their only interest is obstructing our progress.**
President Biden's American Jobs Plan and American Families Plan — in addition to the critically necessary For the People Act — are overwhelmingly popular among voters across party lines, just like the American Rescue Plan was. The voters who turned out in massive numbers in the general election and Georgia runoff elections don't agree with Senator Joe Manchin on keeping the filibuster in place, or weakening our proposals in order to get the support of a senator from a Republican party that wants to stop us at every turn. **They just want us to go big, go bold, and go fast on the change we promised them. They want results — and we must deliver them. Full stop.**
[**If you agree with me that the president and Congressional Democrats should do what we did on the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package — _go it ALONE_ — in order to pass the For the People Act and the transformational infrastructure, jobs, and families plan, contribute $3 or more toward our fight to end the filibuster and pass critical pieces of legislation.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210610?refcode=em20210610-361&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=361_420207_DiNpHo&akid=361%2E420207%2EDiNpHo)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210610?refcode=em20210610-361&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=361_420207_DiNpHo&akid=361%2E420207%2EDiNpHo)**
No more negotiating. No more delays. Let's get this critical work done — _together._
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210610-361-footer&t=22&refcode2=361_420207_DiNpHo&akid=361%2E420207%2EDiNpHo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=361%2E420207%2EDiNpHo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=361%2E420207%2EDiNpHo)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

# **Join Joe Kent at "Make the Third Heard Again" event at Red Barn Studios**
---
| [ ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=197813bc05&e=00856e661d)

Please join me for this dinner fundraiser on 27 June 2021! I hope to see you there!
|
Washingtonians for Change will be hosting a fundraiser for Joe on 27 June, 2021. As part of his grassroots efforts, this fundraiser will continue the momentum forward for the campaign. Joe is honored to have the opportunity to spend an afternoon together speaking and answering questions over dinner! We would be honored if you would join us!

Sincerely,
Byron Sanford, Campaign Manager
**_EVENT DETAILS_**

Date: June 27th, 2021

Time: 1-2pm VIP pre-reception (ticket required)
2-4pm Dinner and Main Event (ticket required)

Location: [Red Barn Studios](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=9e652d35e0&e=00856e661d), Red Barn Studios
207 Goff Road, Chehalis, WA 98532 [Click here for map/directions](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=c797727fbc&e=00856e661d)

**Purchase Tickets:** [Click here to view/purchase tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=ec790d2b4b&e=00856e661d)

_**TICKET DETAILS**_

General Admission ($65.00 per ticket): ticket to main event 2-4pm, includes dinner

Host Committee ($250, two seats): priority seating near the stage. Attend VIP pre-reception 1-2pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 2pm-4pm.

Co-Chairman ($1,000, two seats): priority seating near the stage. Ticket to VIP pre-reception 1-2pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 2pm-4pm. Name listed on invite at each table. Swag bag.

Chairman ($2,900 two seats): priority seating near stage. Ticket to VIP pre-reception 1-2pm with Joe Kent and dinner event 2pm-4pm. Name listed at top of invite and at each table. Swag bag. Private briefing with the Candidate, General Consultant and Campaign Manager (scheduled separately).

Questions? Email info@joekentforcongress.com

name: Team Crist
subject: Here’s what it will take to flip Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
We need the best candidate and the broadest, strongest movement.
|
---

| | Team,

Florida's elections are always close -- **_painfully close._** Our statewide elections are usually decided by _less than a percentage point_.

**[We can (finally!) flip Florida blue and defeat Ron DeSantis next year, but we have to start working NOW. Will you pitch in to help make it happen?](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8LfQso3oh67dkpH4--Xxg==/3KgDPWZZscPYtXqBFRYiTw==?refcode=20210611_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

Democrats can't afford to keep coming up short. If we do, Ron DeSantis will win a second term in 2022, which he'll use to launch his presidential campaign for 2024. _That would be a disaster._

**From what we know now, this is already a tight race: A poll has Charlie _within the margin of error_ going up against Ron DeSantis head-to-head.**

We know this election is going to be close -- it always is in Florida. **But with the best candidate (Charlie!) who believes in putting people over politics and the broadest, strongest movement of folks (like you!) who are ready to build a Florida for all,_we can win._**

**[We need a strong grassroots network of supporters so we can defeat Ron DeSantis and his wealthy Republican backers in the general election. Will you pitch in now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/N8LfQso3oh67dkpH4--Xxg==/3KgDPWZZscPYtXqBFRYiTw==?refcode=20210611_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

Let's do this.

body:
Members of the LGBTQ+ community deserve the same rights and equality under the law as all other Americans, and I’m fighting for them every day in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30630137/290127062/-1197319845?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210611-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGMzNGNhMy1jMWNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VMECskJ6f2oTai5ot_MQVgd8aAxQs-TgFCn3FhE0dgk=)

| Peter,

June is Pride Month. This year, it’s as important as ever that we recognize the progress that has been made for LGBTQ+ Americans, and the work that we still have to do to combat the discrimination that still exists in housing, the workplace, and public accommodations.

**Members of the LGBTQ+ community deserve the same rights and equality under the law as all other Americans,[_and I’m fighting for them every day in Congress._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30630138/290127063/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210611-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGMzNGNhMy1jMWNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VMECskJ6f2oTai5ot_MQVgd8aAxQs-TgFCn3FhE0dgk=)** Unfortunately, we still have a long way to go to ensure full protections and equality for the LGBTQ+ community.

I am a proud cosponsor of the Equality Act, which would ban discrimination based on sexual orientation, and am **honored to have received the endorsement of the Human Rights Campaign.** I helped pass this important legislation in the House earlier this year, but now we need it to get through the Senate before it can become law.

**It’s more important than ever to have champions for LGBTQ+ rights in Congress.[_That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to support my reelection campaign._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30630139/290127064/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210611-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGMzNGNhMy1jMWNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VMECskJ6f2oTai5ot_MQVgd8aAxQs-TgFCn3FhE0dgk=)**

name: Lt. General Jack Bergman, U.S.M.C.
subject: Ilhan Omar: America is like Hamas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c114%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=EG2Eh09fdMfImNeQS%2b14og&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3038%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0AeAEIvQU5xQurZFSGvgzA&sysid=1 "Tweet") FELLOW PATRIOT, **Can you believe it?! Anti-American Rep. Ilhan Omar ramped up her attacks on Israel and the United States this week - saying America, like Hamas and the Taliban, has committed ‘terrible atrocities.’** I didn’t serve 40 years in the United States Marine Corps, rising to the rank of Lieutenant General, to tolerate Ilhan Omar’s repeated attacks on our country! The brave patriots I served alongside and who died in service to our country did not sacrifice their lives, so an anti-American Hamas sympathizer could use her bully pulpit to tear down this great nation. **_I’ve had enough_! As the highest-ranking combat Veteran in Congress and a 3-Star General, _my mission is to protect and defend the Constitution and put America First_!** **[I hope you’ll stand with me by chipping in $25, $50, or $100 to counter attacks on this great nation from within the Halls of Congress!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3039%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C77NjZ88jNv4z5HbiDgEIg&sysid=1 "I hope you’ll stand with me by chipping in $25, $50, or $100 to counter
attacks on this great nation from within the Halls of Congress!")** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3030%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FcQEBpKdR%2buqnqmbGNgwpQ&sysid=1 "Jack Bergman")Like many who served in Vietnam, I know what it’s like to see America-haters like Ilhan Omar take center stage in the radical Left’s war on our way of life. They take advantage of the freedoms we fought for, only to trash American Exceptionalism every chance they get. **To say America committed ‘unspeakable atrocities’ is to side with Hamas terrorists and the anti-American protesters who attack Veterans on their way back home from combat.** I can’t believe Ilhan Omar “represents” Americans in Congress. From investing in science to fighting for solutions that urgently take on climate change, it’s been a long and important week in the Senate, folks. I’m honored every day to fight for the policies that support New Mexico and our country. [**That’s why I’m reaching out to see what’s on your mind. Will you take our one-question survey to let me know your priorities for the year ahead? It’ll take just a minute.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30632426/290136687/-1282285647?refcode=MTH_em_20210611_X_ENG_PS_X_ACT_US_all_all_PS_MTH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDc5ODMzMi1jN2NhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UI3ZsZ6XPnDbk_t55gUWb7vmiz1pqD_BiAK4_2eqJA0=&emci=9b798332-c7ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a0798332-c7ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30632427/290136690/-1282285647?refcode=MTH_em_20210611_X_ENG_PS_X_ACT_US_all_all_PS_MTH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDc5ODMzMi1jN2NhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UI3ZsZ6XPnDbk_t55gUWb7vmiz1pqD_BiAK4_2eqJA0=&emci=9b798332-c7ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a0798332-c7ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Over the past few months we’ve taken huge steps to rebuild from the pandemic — providing needed relief for workers, families, and small businesses through the American Rescue Plan, and getting shots in millions of arms. We have the opportunity now to tackle the most urgent issues of our time and unite our country around our shared values.
Our work to make our country stronger, take on climate change, and transition to a clean-energy future is far from over. I’m leading efforts in the Senate to address the climate crisis with the urgency it deserves and create millions of good-paying jobs for New Mexico. As Republicans work to suppress votes across the country, I’m also fighting to protect and expand voting rights and root out corruption in our politics.
**Folks, I’m in the Senate to fight for progress for New Mexico’s workers and families, so I need to know your priorities, too.**
[**Will you share what issues matter most to you in our one-question survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30632428/290136691/-1282285647?refcode=MTH_em_20210611_X_ENG_PS_X_ACT_US_all_all_PS_MTH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDc5ODMzMi1jN2NhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UI3ZsZ6XPnDbk_t55gUWb7vmiz1pqD_BiAK4_2eqJA0=&emci=9b798332-c7ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a0798332-c7ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30632430/290136693/-1282285647?refcode=MTH_em_20210611_X_ENG_PS_X_ACT_US_all_all_PS_MTH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDc5ODMzMi1jN2NhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UI3ZsZ6XPnDbk_t55gUWb7vmiz1pqD_BiAK4_2eqJA0=&emci=9b798332-c7ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a0798332-c7ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

name: President Trump Birthday Alert (via RNC)
subject: A Birthday Surprise for President Trump

name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: Your Weekly TL;DR Download
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee,
body:
show your pride! 🌈

NDTC-TLDR-Logo
( https://t.dripemail2. )

-----------------------------------
🌈 HOW ARE YOU SHOWING YOUR PRIDE? 🌈
-----------------------------------

Here at NDTC, we are using Pride Month to renew our
commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion.

We’re a big-tent party. And we want our campaigns, leaders, and
organizations to embrace these principles, too!

Scroll down for two courses that will help you incorporate the
foundations of inclusive practice into your work and make
campaigns equitable.

⇨ Do You Want to Run For Office?
( https://t.dripemail2. )

Wednesday, June 16, 8pm ET

If you’re considering running for office, stop by Wednesday’s
training
( https://t.dripemail2. )
!

You’ll talk with the experts about whether running is right for
you, what office you should run for, and what you need to do to
win.

RSVP NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2. )

⇨ How to Create Super Powered Fundraising Asks: A Q&A with Kelly
Dietrich
( https://t.dripemail2. )

Thursday, June 17, 1pm ET

Fundraising asks can be tricky — but, when done well, they leave
your donors feeling empowered and committed to your cause.

On Thursday, NDTC Founder and CEO Kelly Dietrich will be talking
all things fundraising to help you level up your fundraising
strategy!

RSVP NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2. )

⇨ Foundations of Inclusive Practice
( https://t.dripemail2. )

Our strength comes from our diversity — and this is no truer than
in political organizing.

>From candidates to staffers to local leaders, we all have the
power to create a more equitable democracy.

This course will help you understand and advocate for diversity
and inclusion in politics.

TAKE COURSE NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2. )

⇨ Equitable and Inclusive Campaign Practices
( https://t.dripemail2. )

This course will help you make sure your campaign or organization
lives up to its values.

Prioritizing diversity, equity, and inclusion has to be done
intentionally — let our experts show you how to turn your
commitment into action.

TAKE COURSE NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2. )

Article Spotlight: How Your Campaign Can Engage LGBTQIA+ Voters
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZHlsenJxanM2MTFmajliM2dsaXMiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9ibG9nL2VuZ2FnZS1sZ2J0cWlhLXZvdGVycy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjExMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

In celebration of Pride, we need to ensure our campaigns and
organizations represent our LGBTQIA+ friends, neighbors, and
community members.

Our experts lay out strategies to engage LGBTQIA+ voters in a
meaningful, inclusive way so that we can fight for an equitable
future for all. Click here to learn more from our experts.

READ NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZHlsenJxanM2MTFmajliM2dsaXMiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9ibG9nL2VuZ2FnZS1sZ2J0cWlhLXZvdGVycy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjExMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

name: Jim Jordan
subject: midnight voting deadline: Approve of Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
VOTE NOW -- Is President Donald Trump still the leader of the Republican Party? We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ff828d6c728c4c8eb4d23959659e78b7&_e=uibEcOowWGZWSeMRE4CRM7D8xRM7m0VJBQLOIxXfJc0M8lR8-VEO1NvscbCscr0uCqXJmRHzTAcfJfl-5_4SSlHSrmCe58myfAZ_o76XfVDGCMTEVLhWWaEqP96OrD5BHLeSwyTs6n_KMdGb8Jr7ztRXUIXNV8XCv1pWWlOrXlp3Lrz_ZdKNhOwjXrlbPXzrcnx2OVLRc5WGTEurw61XBZJa3WT5hWUEA1jfcGpP0iTwLrHWcwZ7JURdTm7CAqX4sm-Qj30eYYWdPVl819VJQ0HL3tXKKpxieRZcEr3K51CE4wzRM3cs2kNE5sy5df4h4E7R61NOICRVqmqmM7SYMqvz5aEUSr9VDu7xtcPSuOWTJZ1SfWLErnzni8Ekfkf3C5oa150Dn8P74H1O39iRLbb_7eqQktfdkTrACcd3kR5KIEbw0Scu5db0PtTZoM9drhUt2UYso2zC4sIEa414yvQ_X130OOANeT0hwRwplX7LO2Ak1c3-zapkGAyTcAjFah0xIdkduBShZznvXk2GuJDCknIogYHC3oeqCLUrfmo%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 1,000 votes short. **

%%FIRST%%, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ff828d6c728c4c8eb4d23959659e78b7&_e=uibEcOowWGZWSeMRE4CRM7D8xRM7m0VJBQLOIxXfJc0M8lR8-VEO1NvscbCscr0uCqXJmRHzTAcfJfl-5_4SSlHSrmCe58myfAZ_o76XfVDGCMTEVLhWWaEqP96OrD5BHLeSwyTs6n_KMdGb8Jr7ztRXUIXNV8XCv1pWWlOrXlp3Lrz_ZdKNhOwjXrlbPXzrcnx2OVLRc5WGTEurw61XBZJa3WT5hWUEA1jfcGpP0iTwLrHWcwZ7JURdTm7CAqX4sm-Qj30eYYWdPVl819VJQ0HL3tXKKpxieRZcEr3K51CE4wzRM3cs2kNE5sy5df4h21L1NXjHQjdD1wId1XWKOMOeLbKrQFcL-mNAhleOao6aJF9Anknm4R_Vcyxpdu2Q4hfyYCjAg8wTG6XXSU6UBd677kntQs4yKsUEGs2FDlOSVHto1QQGkcyLMhQnPyZ2pxlAa84Qpis64RO1pc-OTbTSEG6rBZjHcy0SJS4JGrf68fmsMIyYvLD5_cFVWwsZzrlSrFXmsx8z5wSalo0XU5mMSX6xqruCVn1reT8pKqM%3D)**

[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ff828d6c728c4c8eb4d23959659e78b7&_e=uibEcOowWGZWSeMRE4CRM7D8xRM7m0VJBQLOIxXfJc0M8lR8-VEO1NvscbCscr0uCqXJmRHzTAcfJfl-5_4SSlHSrmCe58myfAZ_o76XfVDGCMTEVLhWWaEqP96OrD5BHLeSwyTs6n_KMdGb8Jr7ztRXUIXNV8XCv1pWWlOrXlp3Lrz_ZdKNhOwjXrlbPXzrcnx2OVLRc5WGTEurw61XBZJa3WT5hWUEA1jfcGpP0iTwLrHWcwZ7JURdTm7CAqX4sm-Qj30eYYWdPVl819VJQ0HL3tXKKpxieRZcEr3K51CE4wzRM3cs2kNE5sy5df4hHhNLJ0Yv5FPf0ACDXoRos7gsPg9dKuVXZvPbui1Tc0hTyOCkvxr7AKK8Wm-UeyDpo4de957ExCaIM4qIKZJppt_yrTb0Ss0GIR1g8z3Iy3hrSqHroR1wT3C0Y7_f5Xo-QLjPbyJMFvDc7lpUuDP2N4a353L7DIaVSFrz3UPqH5n7amry8sgxgbVAAn2SRhEryOjNzAAjLiSeHpP_hfIAzVrqFgsv-YuTsfMN6-GFptA%3D)
* **_no response will result in an automatic *NO* selction*_**
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ff828d6c728c4c8eb4d23959659e78b7&_e=uibEcOowWGZWSeMRE4CRM7D8xRM7m0VJBQLOIxXfJc0M8lR8-VEO1NvscbCscr0uCqXJmRHzTAcfJfl-5_4SSlHSrmCe58myfAZ_o76XfVDGCMTEVLhWWaEqP96OrD5BHLeSwyTs6n_KMdGb8Jr7ztRXUIXNV8XCv1pWWlOrXlp3Lrz_ZdKNhOwjXrlbPXzrcnx2OVLRc5WGTEurw61XBZJa3WT5hWUEA1jfcGpP0iTwLrHWcwZ7JURdTm7CAqX4sm-Qj30eYYWdPVl819VJQ0HL3tXKKpxieRZcEr3K51CE4wzRM3cs2kNE5sy5df4hQeyf6p4u5GA-DTh81OzbUoiXOAXcoP8XKQzRmdgCmtoAqWa5Kr0_SQ-zzO7Feh1GsDnBYtyExuIOvfGHTAUI5hTI-0vlo8qAjP3dkYEKgKAERtg5ctHxtHqrqzIY4w9ACtmgwJky-IunFLcBWFI5GKRkP1hQA90uXd4jbue4zLb68qVzP3JsMMGuL9FY3zmsy-tBcSEQnMMsFCzDHjPHe8IVRrTu_DM5Mj-pa7Mumc4%3D)**

We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: A Big Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
This is a big week for Indiana Republicans, bookended by two exciting events. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470550?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_A Big Week_** This is a big week for Indiana Republicans, bookended by two exciting events. It started last Saturday when your state Republican Party hosted a training for new county GOP officers. Nearly 100 new and returning county officers joined us at the Hendricks County 4-H Fairgrounds for our day-long training. It was exciting to see so many dedicated and enthusiastic county officers give up a Saturday during their summer for this valuable seminar. We covered campaign basics, using data, communications and media relations, fundraising, and several other topics. This passion and dedication at the grassroots level is how we’ll continue our Republican winning streak in Indiana.

And this week closes out with another big event. It’s tonight, in fact (provided that you’re reading this on Friday). I’m looking forward to our Spring Dinner this evening, the first large-scale gathering of Hoosier Republicans since the pandemic started. We’ve got a great keynote speaker lined up, Arkansas gubernatorial candidate and former White House press secretary Sarah Huckabee Sanders. If you haven’t purchased your tickets yet, you still have a few hours to do so. More information is below.

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer speaks at the Lawrence Township GOP Club._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Building One Indiana for All**_ **Governor Holcomb** has named Brad Chambers, the president, CEO, and founder of Buckingham Comapnies, as the state's new Secretary of Commerce. He will begin his new role on July 6. Together, **Governor Holcomb** and Brad Chambers will continue breaking jobs and economic development records.
_**“There is no one more qualified to lead our economic development efforts than someone who’s been a leader in the business for 35 years. Not only has Brad created, grown and expanded his business from the ground up, he’s been focused on how his work contributes to making Indiana the best place to invest, work, and live for his entire career." -Governor Holcomb**_
**Governor Holcomb** also attended the Fraternal Order of Police Conference in French Lick. **Governor Holcomb** thanked Hoosier law enforcement officers for their commitment to keeping our state safe and for their help in passing House Bill 1006.

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb speaking at the 86th annual Fraternal Order of Police state conference._
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**County Officer Summer Training**_ Thank you County Officers for making our summer training seminar such a success!
---
|
---
| _**GOP Spring Dinner is TONIGHT!**_
Last minute tickets are still available for our annual Spring Dinner. You won't want to miss this opportunity to hear from Sarah Huckabee Sanders and your Hoosier Republican officials! To RSVP contact Hannah Bond at [hbond@indiana.gop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb93325aeb&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Happy Birthday Mike!_** Vice President Mike Pence’s birthday was earlier this week and we at the Indiana Republican Party extend our best wishes for a Happy Birthday with many more to come! Happy Birthday Mike!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=08a30b6090&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Sen. Young's Endless Frontier Act_** Senator Todd Young’s Endless Frontier Act passed the Senate with wide bipartisan support. Senator Young’s landmark bill is designed to out-compete China in key emerging technology areas critical to our national security.
_**“This bill, this moment, it’s not only about beating the Chinese Communist Party; the Endless Frontier Act is about using their challenge to become a better version of ourselves through investment in innovation.” -Senator Young**_
You can view his entire floor speech by clicking the screenshot above and you can read more about the Endless Frontier Act by [clicking here.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ce718d8007&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[June 11](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3325a7aa05&e=1acd9bb3d6): 2021 Indiana GOP Spring Dinner
[June 16](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8643002faa&e=1acd9bb3d6): 31st Annual Henry County GOP Open
[June 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=44bd02a719&e=1acd9bb3d6): Jasper County GOP Golf Scramble
[July 17](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=80fb0f3547&e=1acd9bb3d6): Blackford County Lincoln Day Dinner
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb** [names new Secretary of Commerce](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=56571cc8ef&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[celebrates National Dairy Month](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=086e5cc510&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [shares ways to ease back into the office after COVID-19](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82820d32f2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[warns of a possible scam](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=54386b799c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan **[stops in Columbia City to visit Steel Dynamics](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d6217cf92b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [announces settlement with nation's largest suprime auto financing company](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1142f72411&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[speaks about his Endless Frontiers Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9a17bd686e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun** [presses Biden administration for answers on COVID origin](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ad9d6c3826&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[introduces legislation to boost small & mid size businesses](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b1f652783&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[criticizes Biden's border response](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a51a20d23&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: This is a big week for Indiana Republicans, bookended by two exciting events. | | | | | | | | A Big Week This is a big week for Indiana Republicans, bookended by two exciting events. It started last Saturday when your state Republican Party hosted a training for new county GOP officers. Nearly 100 new and returning county officers joined us at the Hendricks County 4-H Fairgrounds for our day-long training. It was exciting to see so many dedicated and enthusiastic county officers give up a Saturday during their summer for this valuable seminar. We covered campaign basics, using data, communications and media relations, fundraising, and several other topics. This passion and dedication at the grassroots level is how we’ll continue our Republican winning streak in Indiana. And this week closes out with another big event. It’s tonight, in fact (provided that you’re reading this on Friday). I’m looking forward to our Spring Dinner this evening, the first large-scale gathering of Hoosier Republicans since the pandemic started. We’ve got a great keynote speaker lined up, Arkansas gubernatorial candidate and former White House press secretary Sarah Huckabee Sanders. If you haven’t purchased your tickets yet, you still have a few hours to do so. More information is below. Thanks Kyle Photo : Chairman Hupfer speaks at the Lawrence Township GOP Club. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Building One Indiana for All Governor Holcomb has named Brad Chambers, the president, CEO, and founder of Buckingham Comapnies, as the state's new Secretary of Commerce. He will begin his new role on July 6. Together, Governor Holcomb and Brad Chambers will continue breaking jobs and economic development records. “There is no one more qualified to lead our economic development efforts than someone who’s been a leader in the business for 35 years. Not only has Brad created, grown and expanded his business from the ground up, he’s been focused on how his work contributes to making Indiana the best place to invest, work, and live for his entire career." -Governor Holcomb Governor Holcomb also attended the Fraternal Order of Police Conference in French Lick. Governor Holcomb thanked Hoosier law enforcement officers for their commitment to keeping our state safe and for their help in passing House Bill 1006. Photo: Governor Holcomb speaking at the 86th annual Fraternal Order of Police state conference. | | | | County Officer Summer Training Thank you County Officers for making our summer training seminar such a success! | | GOP Spring Dinner is TONIGHT! Last minute tickets are still available for our annual Spring Dinner. You won't want to miss this opportunity to hear from Sarah Huckabee Sanders and your Hoosier Republican officials! To RSVP contact Hannah Bond at . | | | | | Happy Birthday Mike! Vice President Mike Pence’s birthday was earlier this week and we at the Indiana Republican Party extend our best wishes for a Happy Birthday with many more to come! Happy Birthday Mike! | | | Sen. Young's Endless Frontier Act Senator Todd Young’s Endless Frontier Act passed the Senate with wide bipartisan support. Senator Young’s landmark bill is designed to out-compete China in key emerging technology areas critical to our national security. “This bill, this moment, it’s not only about beating the Chinese Communist Party; the Endless Frontier Act is about using their challenge to become a better version of ourselves through investment in innovation.” -Senator Young You can view his entire floor speech by clicking the screenshot above and you can read more about the Endless Frontier Act by | | Upcoming Republican Events : 2021 Indiana GOP Spring Dinner : 31st Annual Henry County GOP Open : Jasper County GOP Golf Scramble : Blackford County Lincoln Day Dinner | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Secretary of State Holli Sullivan Attorney General Todd Rokita Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: My meeting with President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1750e069cdf66463/d994f2967cadb7a8c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, Yesterday, I met with President Trump at the Trump National Golf Club in Bedminster, NJ, and he was in great spirits. We talked a lot about the great work we’ve accomplished together for Oklahoma and the importance of conservative leadership at every level of government. He was impressed with my work on the Republican budget and wants to partner with conservative leaders to ensure a return to fiscal responsibility and America First policies. President Trump’s top priority right now is taking back the majority in the House of Representatives next fall and he needs your help. [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1750e069cdf66463/b587c16cb725f732c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**> >> Help Trump Take Back the House <<<**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1750e069cdf66463/9d1123d5c33bb752c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Biden and Pelosi are working to dismantle everything President Trump accomplished during the last four years. The only way we can stop them is to put Republicans back in charge of Congress. Biden’s radical agenda is unpopular among every demographic, including some in his own party – but that’s not stopping Democrats from ramming their tax-and-spend policies through Congress at breakneck speed. **If we don’t stop them, America as we know it will be gone.** President Trump was very clear yesterday that he will do whatever it takes to win the House back. He’ll be campaigning around the country to put America First conservatives back in power. President Trump can’t wait to get back out on the campaign trail and see the American people face-to-face – maybe we’ll even get to see him in Oklahoma again! I promised President Trump that I’d tell you about our important work to take back the House. **He wanted me to ask every red-blooded conservative back home to join him in this essential mission to restore the Republican majority and save his legacy. [Will you help us take back the House?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1750e069cdf66463/5a253e40f25c8d31c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** Thank you for your continued friendship and support, Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1750e069cdf66463/1e8ac2a7870091b2c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1750e069cdf66463/f0f23dfdf97a45dbc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

We talked a lot about the great work we’ve accomplished together for Oklahoma and the importance of conservative leadership at every level of government. He was impressed with my work on the Republican budget and wants to partner with conservative leaders to ensure a return to fiscal responsibility and America First policies. name: Gen. Boykin
subject: Every Bible-believing American will suffer under this legislation
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c120%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JpugKOovU00HX6JF6GXYng&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3105%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AGo%2bqUl03pgCyrQ4e9Fr9Q&sysid=1) | |
---
Dear fellow American,

As our nation deals with the ripple effects of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is critical that Christian and conservative Americans hold the line on our values as leftists try to exploit the crisis to push their anti-biblical policies.

Imagine an America where religious hospitals are forced to perform abortions. Where Bible-believing churches could be forced to hire pastors and other employees who don’t follow the teachings of the church and could be required to host same-sex wedding ceremonies. Where Christian schools are forced to cater to the preferences of students who identify as transgender, threatening the privacy and safety of young girls.

If the Senate passes the “Equality” Act -- which has already passed the House of Representatives -- _**this is the future that could lie before us**._

This disastrous legislation is an all-out assault on parental rights, on the family, and on millions of people of faith in our nation. It quarantines faith within your mind and says that’s where it must stay!

**Almost no institution or person of faith --be it a school, church, business, or non-profit--will escape the reach of this catastrophic bill if it passes the Senate and is sent to President Biden’s desk, where it’s sure to be signed into law. **

**[Can I count on your gift of $10, $25, $50, or more to help Family Research Council Action defeat the “Equality” Act today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3106%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uva02BhZuuGZFfVIpG9DnA&sysid=1)**
[**Help Stop the "Equality" Act**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3107%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nDZiPxK72vBvAcgtI7FP7Q&sysid=1)
While touted as “equality,” this legislation would be more appropriately named the “Inequality Act.”

It aims to expand numerous civil rights laws, including the Civil Rights Act of 1964, to create protected classes based on sexual orientation and gender identity, thereby positioning the government to lord over churches and other faith-based institutions, potentially dictating who they hire, how their facilities are used, and even punishing some of them for not falling in step with a view of human sexuality that directly contradicts orthodox biblical teaching.

It would force all those in the medical community--regardless of their moral, religious, or medical opinions--to offer hormone treatment and transgender surgeries for individuals suffering from gender dysphoria.

**If passed and signed into law, it would cause a significant loss of religious freedom in America, and every Bible-believing citizen will suffer the consequences. **

**This bill is an egregious attack on the freedom to believe, and it must be stopped!**

Many of the nation's top evangelical pastors and religious leaders have already signed a letter warning against this bill, and now I need your signature to help stop this disastrous legislation.

**[I hope I can count on you to join us with your gift to STOP the “Equality” Act.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3108%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bmTNKLYEsR34QgzxKV3e7A&sysid=1)**

As the legislative affiliate of Family Research Council, FRC Action seeks to educate and influence elected officials on Capitol Hill and in the states, activate our grassroots network, and mobilize voters on behalf of faith, family, and freedom.

**FRC Action exists so that our nation’s most fundamental values are represented as we impact public policy, influence elections, and support candidates who share our values. **

Even during these difficult times, you and I must continue our vital work to defeat the “Equality” Act, which poses the gravest threat in decades to the American family and religious liberty.

But to continue leading the charge to stop this disastrous bill, we need your support.

**[Please help us urge the Senate to reject this legislation and defend religious freedom in America with your gift of $10, $25, or any amount today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3109%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eqWbYIzcGeTAUhBCgJwsBg&sysid=1)**
[**Help Stop the "Equality" Act**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3107%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nDZiPxK72vBvAcgtI7FP7Q&sysid=1)
With your help, we will defeat the “Equality” Act.

Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

[1-877/372-2808](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3100%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=udLOyHHpwrw5cPCM8ydMkA&sysid=1) | [Contact FRC Action](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3101%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tmtkySD5i2slB%2fIa7sdUiQ&sysid=1)

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3102%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Amobqz5%2f9h%2fnpb2O9huP%2fw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3103%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c3d1aK%2ffNIUqhWUpqHCnwQ&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3104%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A1C4rrI6OlDH%2btIWlv6oSg&sysid=1)

The infrastructure bill currently under debate in Congress would bring billions of dollars and thousands of jobs to fix our roads, our trains, our sewage systems — like the crater-sized potholes on I-83 or the decrepit water and sewage system in Harrisburg that sends sewage into the Susquehanna River every time it rains.
**Instead of listening to his constituents and finding solutions, Scott Perry is throwing fake outrage at reporters:**

The truth is right here in front of us. Scott Perry has no problem blowing up the deficit to give OUR tax dollars to billionaires and giant corporations, yet won’t raise a finger - or invest a buck - to help us or our communities.

Thank you,
Eugene

clean_body: Are you watching what’s happening in Washington right now? Look fast and you’ll see a unicorn in the wild. Democrats and Republicans, from the President on down, are working together to pass an infrastructure bill that’s a can’t-miss opportunity to fix our nation’s long-neglected roads, bridges, rail networks and other crucial infrastructure systems. = Friend, Are you watching what’s happening in Washington right now? Look fast and you’ll see a unicorn in the wild. Democrats and Republicans, from the President on down, are working together to pass an infrastructure bill that’s a can’t-miss opportunity to fix our nation’s long-neglected roads, bridges, rail networks and other crucial infrastructure systems. Even better, this infrastructure bill has the potential to fix problems we all agree on AND ensure our post-pandemic economic recovery includes those of us who didn’t make BILLIONS of dollars profiting off the COVID-19 national crisis. (Looking at you Jeff Bezos!). Yet, Scott Perry is telling us — AGAIN — he cares more for his radical, divisive agenda than getting anything done for us. Instead of working to make sure PA-10 is part of this desperately needed economic recovery, he’s playing cynical political games, trying to pit us against big cities, so we don’t notice he’s throwing us under the bus. Want a Member of Congress who wants to get things done? Me too! You can help make that happen by chipping in whatever you can to our campaign to send Scott Perry out of Washington on a rail. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = The infrastructure bill currently under debate in Congress would bring billions of dollars and thousands of jobs to fix our roads, our trains, our sewage systems — like the crater-sized potholes on I-83 or the decrepit water and sewage system in Harrisburg that sends sewage into the Susquehanna River every time it rains. Instead of listening to his constituents and finding solutions, Scott Perry is throwing fake outrage at reporters: The truth is right here in front of us. Scott Perry has no problem blowing up the deficit to give OUR tax dollars to billionaires and giant corporations, yet won’t raise a finger - or invest a buck - to help us or our communities. = If you believe, like I do, that our shared resources are better spent investing in regular people and Main Street, instead of billionaires and Wall Street, I hope you’ll consider contributing what you can to my campaign. Thank you, Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Eugene DePasquale is considering running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. | | Peter, Over the last month I have made more than 2,000 calls and spoken with more than 250 people – some of them current or former Republicans. The good news is, they feel the same way we do. They know who won the 2020 election. They want more participation in our democracy. And they want better health care, improved public education and people working for a decent wage. My questions for the Republican politicians in Washington D.C. are all about _why_. _Why the conspiracy theories and lies about the 2020 election?_ _Why make it harder for people to vote?_ _Why deny access to basic rights like health care, education, and a decent wage?_ **That last one is a real mess, Peter. Today's Republican party opposes – sometimes violently – the idea that people in our country deserve the health care they need to survive, the education they need to get ahead, and the wages they need to feed their families.** _Why_? **Here's one answer: because they want to divide us for their own gain--it's easy to raise money by railing against something, it's much harder when you try to solve problems.[Chip in $3 and let's solve some of these problems, together!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30644734/290181611/-34735242?refcode=2021-06-11-why&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6184caaa-e5ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTg0Y2FhYS1lNWNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u6gqB_OTWZbB5-v3TxYw27XdJwm0M81qoSW_5Jo4RTk=)** Year after year, election after election, Republicans in Congress get worse and worse. **These career politicians won't allow an inquiry into the January 6th insurrection. They are actively trying to deny voting rights to millions of Americans. And every issue that matters to our future, from climate change to gun safety, is off the table.** I've had enough. **I decided to run for the U.S. Senate because, for years, insider Democrats haven't done nearly enough to stand up to Republicans in Washington D.C. I'll be part of the outsider movement to change that.** Because our democracy cannot stand much more. **[Please make a donation of $3 right now. We need to keep this campaign and our message going so we can ask the tough questions in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30644735/290181612/-34735242?refcode=2021-06-11-why&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6184caaa-e5ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTg0Y2FhYS1lNWNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u6gqB_OTWZbB5-v3TxYw27XdJwm0M81qoSW_5Jo4RTk=)** clean_body: | | | Peter, Over the last month I have made more than 2,000 calls and spoken with more than 250 people – some of them current or former Republicans. The good news is, they feel the same way we do. They know who won the 2020 election. They want more participation in our democracy. And they want better health care, improved public education and people working for a decent wage. My questions for the Republican politicians in Washington D.C. are all about why. Why the conspiracy theories and lies about the 2020 election? Why make it harder for people to vote? Why deny access to basic rights like health care, education, and a decent wage? That last one is a real mess, Peter. Today's Republican party opposes – sometimes violently – the idea that people in our country deserve the health care they need to survive, the education they need to get ahead, and the wages they need to feed their families. Why? Here's one answer: because they want to divide us for their own gain--it's easy to raise money by railing against something, it's much harder when you try to solve problems.= Year after year, election after election, Republicans in Congress get worse and worse. These career politicians won't allow an inquiry into the January 6th insurrection. They are actively trying to deny voting rights to millions of Americans. And every issue that matters to our future, from climate change to gun safety, is off the table. I've had enough. I decided to run for the U.S. Senate because, for years, insider Democrats haven't done nearly enough to stand up to Republicans in Washington D.C. I'll be part of the outsider movement to change that. Because our democracy cannot stand much more. = John Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA ---|--- | This email was sent by McGuiganForPA P.O. subject: New Jobs are coming to Indiana — see who is opening up shop

body:
Governor Holcomb has set a precedent across the state to incentivize businesses to move to and expand within Indiana. Friend, June is shaping up to be another big win on the jobs front for Hoosiers. Governor Holcomb has set a precedent across the state to incentivize businesses to move to and expand within Indiana. Companies big and small are making Indiana home and hiring Hoosiers in droves. **That’s why Indiana is #1 in the Midwest for entrepreneur friendliness. ** _I’ve included a few articles below that highlight how Indiana is open for business:_ [**_[READ] Tempur Sealy bringing 300 jobs to Montgomery County_**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=45abf9074de94f519c48afe860292831&_e=4BVNKbd0iL_81Rmw6VZSLFPC4zAsoU2zBtOWmEtEZ6OH40M5VcOcHGzZk1hDlRqOYt0HBN-MA1xvT_uqnkI4q4puO0J_gcFSphlNuGEnuCpCJXSQUlmhbA4RtSPgZz7FbQnV72lyY4UBa3JtldxYy1a-BW6wbjjbeKlt0d2G1Hjpe5VySG9AWrnQ-O281KMDcs3xmlh90UUtJK1FNnv0GJIBWvBdzN6bmBLIQ6gUXDPWIZlXEpo_ortTASqb0elt-BXh7UkUTwmSbjfnJHMgN2VFgy_aOSLgTQRAjmtI8_lIXvyTplzVJ4j9AlLqYTtSNjBqpWW6jqk9LCbYyLsh-Lg_ckOareABicSgocS72DSg6YS94EoFpor2iCZ_CUXpHteQA-VroFmpZnOCVtRAdVpppkVAnjSx4HXvXtsTG3WfbLc_iQ98Qf_JVQx1D-bNMszHJ8Gj6fh5i-EzqylGpsjNV1sqSzCGfy1daodFkiCO7Zyxx_E_GmdZAnIAT4yVW2Ry_2PrXLZauDhpxpaTWjzEANDq6dCkwsm1lalRCYZ6kG6HHCAcjlzUVP6wYwB3rZPV4COrjtgUxSJifDUCDkIWxTrozMQz0a9Psz1Ul44%3D) Holcomb. "I’m confident Indiana’s pro-business environment and talented workforce will allow the company to grow and thrive here as they work to deliver critical health care solutions.”_ –– Area Development Online [_**[READ] Cyberseek Indiana resource launches to promote jobs in growing cybersecurity industry**_**
**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=45abf9074de94f519c48afe860292831&_e=QY9X7kV81M-LLh9zuEbmJ_8wimYV00pP3lEkacL8t6Yfpvo-AR_ymIziqr6m0chnym4Cn2kQlKz1emSgz3qwzzlVlGGXSdbQzCVsC1kwTWGdxKS9NWnFp7aGvvmP6iCsohQlj6_1SroBPOhH1ye_gV-m_I54weqVjk9NtclN2WMsCmjFaQtc39mCrBjVdJgFK7vaQPdgrr5RcpXjpKCUOjwus7tElhn9wfIU4zqoFicPngS4v1QHrk-hxT56oCpuZ5LuVNxyo0z0l_KSCqmFAyipEJR6NvQNfsTj4z8yUwFhba3Z1iJCSMPQH0NjJZZQqcaiGheGVgXwFSuyd9-aq2XYw8nmASUelK6DKxQRXh7QCqIjhWgM4E-742oV8_A6vr1czpqDhb1GvoCYJHqzBomqzT1We9NewCE5907lRAZtGNrj4B8GZdueeIZjHnn6IWfWJnJS1wV5Rz8uy2nWIso94GuMnRl8Ufpu-mgNLgErnmyxybrJL3Ey2M-KRaA6msVNAacPFnaSpbk6k7uFpV6oTEa-Yv-CEHPl8V_l6IDwCk_8TJlkLnBgyDgNur3t)**The bottom line:** _“Understanding Indiana’s job demand for cybersecurity professionals who have the right skills, education, and training has been a key area of focus for our agency as well as Governor Holcomb’s Executive Council on Cybersecurity,” said Jeff Tucker, Indiana Department of Workforce Development chief information officer. “By partnering with Burning Glass, CompTIA and Purdue, we are excited to deliver a tool that can improve our understanding of our cybersecurity workforce and talent pipeline.”_ –– WBIW Friend, thank you as always for your continued support Building One Indiana for ALL. Fellow American,

Let me be clear, as a black Republican... **Reparations from people that never owned slaves is wrong!**

I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and **I was struck by how those reparations made ZERO impact on the kind of man my father and I became.**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2c92779f8dd54f58a1fe8123fa18c20a&_e=rGFsuBtOZB_LleV3BWRJBLv3s4LWOJm_GHQ9k9UIeynzo-oueRlVuF0ZSFUMTvllcjQGb3iS5GHqUK8r1YkSjl1Sa8uqCCPSNr6nJvnVSMQS4Yh-A6bQTwHLlsjW-B_vCeDI7AWWqsFZe1odjrCU5OYqEesof-ZEI5yYRTw-uwSPekSU6TQbKWiI5bZcTq6YxldcI43lwsLk1t_q9_HRjH8TQM_6jkcPPyMkqZ2Sx7WcgYR-Fy2bO0CsQboC8g0xGMoKFa5AYb9ZzbKIeetv40sjWxgxMv9allYG58KwXZ1RlxOVSPHTEnHJvnUaLDRVJpw89RlqvD0TX8_4vdo_LBXuA_u_iPMmlq32jc077-VfLrS1IcCikf3F7EKW51LDhvS1tUJaiASqsD4VzCulwtUjr3VnGb-Yyw56cKeOxZkLpdnVqJ4pUPTB-WSdmMrWFdLGg6__Lt54nv2YeZbQeNpaKU0Zvn_GeZGBc3iuEgg%3D) _Sitting on the land where my father died - his ashes buried under this magnolia tree._

name: Jim Jordan
subject: opinion poll: do you approve of Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58229144:s971cHdN7:m:1:2247059263:A17699B22C8500E5C782A3075AEF1AC7:r)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we're not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we're coming up 1,000 votes short. **

{{#if [FirstName]}}{{[FirstName]}}{{else}}Fellow Conservative{{/if}}, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58229144:s971cHdN7:m:1:2247059263:A17699B22C8500E5C782A3075AEF1AC7:r)**

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58229144:s971cHdN7:m:1:2247059263:A17699B22C8500E5C782A3075AEF1AC7:r)

You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go - and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year's midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58229144:s971cHdN7:m:1:2247059263:A17699B22C8500E5C782A3075AEF1AC7:r)**

We need to know whether or not you're going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

| [**Take My Trump Poll Today ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58229144:s971cHdN7:m:1:2247059263:A17699B22C8500E5C782A3075AEF1AC7:r)

body:

You might recognize me from Donald Trump’s impeachment trial -- I was one of the managers tasked with making the case.

But before all that, I was a Black girl who grew up poor in the South. **I could only _dream_ of a seat at the table in politics – or even just being in the room.**

But here I am -- the first person in my family to graduate from college, representing the people of my district.

**And I take that duty seriously. Unlike Marco Rubio.**

Unlike Marco Rubio, I won’t sell out when it’s easy.
Unlike Marco Rubio, I won’t bow to strongmen like Donald Trump.
**And unlike Marco Rubio, as Florida’s next Senator, I will actually fight for Florida families.**

But the GOP machine doesn’t want to see this seat in Democratic hands -- so they are already throwing everything they can to keep my campaign underwater.

Friend, we cannot sit on the sidelines while our democracy is under attack. Right now, Republican lawmakers in Arizona and across the country are working to pass _hundreds_ of voter suppression bills – all to promote Trump's "Big Lie," silence voters and steal the next election.

Democrats have the power to stop these attacks by passing the For the People Act, but we have a problem: Because of a Senate procedure called the filibuster, even _one_ Republican objecting to the bill means it could be stalled forever.** That means as long as the filibuster stays in place, Mitch McConnell can block the For the People Act and hold our democracy hostage.**
I will always fight for the people of Arizona – no matter what. And right now, that means being crystal clear about the need to end the filibuster and pass the For the People Act. **The extremist GOP is doing everything they can to silence our voices, so the last thing we need is for Democrats to be more concerned with the way Washington works than with our fundamental rights.**
The Senate is slated to vote on the For the People Act _this month_ , so I'm calling on grassroots supporters like you to speak out with me right now – while we still have the chance to change course and pass this legislation. **But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're still falling 127 responses short in ****18326****– so please, friend, tell me now:**

We can’t let them get away with this. We need to push for a commission to investigate January 6 and the events leading up to Trump’s mob storming the United States Capitol. [**Before the end of the day, will you add your name and call on Congress to create a bipartisan commission to investigate the January 6 insurrection?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30646553/290188532/-99053356?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZThkNmIxMi1lYmNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ug46FxHldWHUPMHSl39C5E_x5HkCglQTm5VwFAkUIyA=&emci=ddf5d2fe-35ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ee8d6b12-ebca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769) [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30646554/290188533/-99053356?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZThkNmIxMi1lYmNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ug46FxHldWHUPMHSl39C5E_x5HkCglQTm5VwFAkUIyA=&emci=ddf5d2fe-35ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ee8d6b12-ebca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769)

**June 30, 2021** That’s the most important date of the year, friend. It’s the day our team has to publicly report our fundraising numbers to the Texas Ethics Commission. But before I ask for your support, I want to explain why your contribution matters so much to us: This will be our first ever finance report. You see, once our reports become public, politicians, reporters, and donors across the state and nation will look to see if we have the momentum to run a winning campaign. This is our opportunity to prove that the people of Texas are tired of Greg Abbott’s and Dan Patrick’s partisan games and culture wars. We have to show that our people-powered movement isn't going anywhere and that Texans are ready for new leadership. That’s why your support is so important to us. Friend,

I almost couldn’t believe my ears.

name: Team Kilmer
subject: We urgently need the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
**We Have a Once-in-a-Generation Opportunity to Protect LGBTQ People From Discrimination. Will the Senate Take It?

[We need to pass the Equality Act NOW. Sign on to demand the Senate urgently pass this critical civil rights legislation.](https://act.myngp.com/el/AJod-27-JNoPkLmcarBpgpOBGF0zRG67Pk3SmqKLpRk=/Xtou9yiwsIZcUloUzk9li6MuwJ14SGPdUjtCmJgvjlU=?gpsid=50_115_19317&ms=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/AJod-27-JNoPkLmcarBpgpOBGF0zRG67Pk3SmqKLpRk=/Xtou9yiwsIZcUloUzk9li6MuwJ14SGPdUjtCmJgvjlU=?gpsid=50_115_19317&ms=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
---
| Peter,

2021 has been the worst year for anti-LGBTQ+ legislation in recent history, with states across the country enacting more than double the number of hateful laws seen in the past three years _combined_.

These discriminatory pieces of legislation endanger the lives of the LGBTQ+ community and embolden hateful extremists. It's absolutely critical that the federal government takes meaningful action to counteract these anti-LGBTQ+ laws.

Derek and his colleagues in the House have already passed the Equality Act to do just that -- and now the Senate must do the same. This comprehensive civil rights legislation would provide federal protections for the LGBTQ+ community and explicitly prohibit discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity.

**It 's not an exaggeration to say that the Equality Act will save lives. [Will you celebrate Pride Month by standing up against discrimination and hate and call on the Senate to pass the Equality Act without delay?](https://act.myngp.com/el/AJod-27-JNoPkLmcarBpgpOBGF0zRG67Pk3SmqKLpRk=/Xtou9yiwsIZcUloUzk9li6MuwJ14SGPdUjtCmJgvjlU=?gpsid=50_115_19317&ms=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/AJod-27-JNoPkLmcarBpgpOBGF0zRG67Pk3SmqKLpRk=/1iH3LN_gtuOXh2l7gsO9Fifnd95p50ynYq-Dhcs-yBI=?gpsid=50_115_19318&refcode=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_EqlAct_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
---

Tacoma WA 98402 United States

clean_body: This campaign will decide it all. | Peter, I need your help ending Kamala’s reign over the Senate. Navy SEAL Eric Greitens is running for the OPEN Senate Seat in Missouri that will decide the fate of the 50/50 Senate -- and, ultimately, the fate of America. I was honored to become National Chair of Eric Greitens’ U.S. Senate campaign. He needed a National Chair on his team, because his election truly is a battle for the heart and soul of our nation. Winning the Senate is our only hope of saving America from the radical Left’s agenda. National Democrats like George Soros will spend anything they can to try and stop a pro-Trump conservative like Eric from winning this Senate seat. But that’s why I became Eric’s National Chair -- to fight back against the national Democrats who are trying to sabotage his campaign to take back the Senate from Kamala’s control. Now I’m asking for your help to be part of the national effort to build a new, pro-Trump 51/49 majority. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f23a0481d7fe459787cc1737dee97daa&_e=5J-jxkJAPeqnzpL1fLrNq8eVkqboXl1iOxHZt__HRPYH_-z-Ev9nVA_A0SFCHUk7lKLwRK_XcVqVLn40d0y1iWCMhlRp6vYxdbibQUZvsIRg1VkKs0sAWDzM1z3aHxLgy6OGOwOGX_Ohq4JVz5Q7SL46CnN9yhP6LuNPw1jIghT61SyYWuTW7_GGDtsRPGd1Ji7oe9o_3hXi2RlWxFpyh1WXyP_-XbKKqEUVlOKzprDs2yzv78GeMbvlGeBI_zXlEVZa707wg0a_Z5cozE93VlJIkRmBdzyJ1PLrSj8DXtf-2n7wvOOd8okzMPYfrOCoROygWJd4VCYjaADPFqibatSGn6BLwVUkvaYPpUWC64yzoCnsiOKr3s7QShDCrWsfHGbNTQQBJhLvDN0n5OlP2SIZ95nw2UZQDdjU9l_REA6A_Gf51x4CIkzteG_iUDjt-TVmgftCMK6or-SQX9_nig%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day.

Last year I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality long ago. **My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism** , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need.

Recently, I launched my second campaign for Congress and **[I am asking for your help to fill our campaign accounts which we were forced to empty entirely last fall](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f23a0481d7fe459787cc1737dee97daa&_e=5J-jxkJAPeqnzpL1fLrNq8eVkqboXl1iOxHZt__HRPYH_-z-Ev9nVA_A0SFCHUk7lKLwRK_XcVqVLn40d0y1iWCMhlRp6vYxdbibQUZvsIRg1VkKs0sAWDzM1z3aHxLgy6OGOwOGX_Ohq4JVz5Q7SL46CnN9yhP6LuNPw1jIghT61SyYWuTW7_GGDtsRPGd1Ji7oe9o_3hXi2RlWxFpyh1WXyP_-XbKKqEUVlOKzprDs2yzv78GeMbvlGeBI_zXlufyZLHG-zYY7e0bPcb9bkMENZCvEB2klCiGgYgTp8TPmWAGSE7zrdtUGbFHYRq2DEmZ00L49HxPtmztZ5fmOGIB0RftHwdwoAx3Z4yq4GtNU5MWrBVx-Wa7dxNinVoAwKxDrtKVpwNv33P2ikzjEEP6LjGFPR9Ew0wXL_EvuB0s3TNnPFcGhNnYaAyFQMgzFIl5eJ77S647CFOW_syZ3EA%3D%3D)**.

Republicans are on the cusp of flipping the House - we only need a net gain of FIVE seats - **[simply put, there is no way I can't sit on the sidelines and not do my part, so I'm challenging Peter DeFazio once again.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f23a0481d7fe459787cc1737dee97daa&_e=5J-jxkJAPeqnzpL1fLrNq8eVkqboXl1iOxHZt__HRPYH_-z-Ev9nVA_A0SFCHUk7lKLwRK_XcVqVLn40d0y1iWCMhlRp6vYxdbibQUZvsIRg1VkKs0sAWDzM1z3aHxLgy6OGOwOGX_Ohq4JVz5Q7SL46CnN9yhP6LuNPw1jIghT61SyYWuTW7_GGDtsRPGd1Ji7oe9o_3hXi2RlWxFpyh1WXyP_-XbKKqEUVlOKzprDs2yzv78GeMbvlGeBI_zXltV9vruVdgqTUlBG6hLtcDBQuiCORIHyia5vNWFAPnkzHMCbsV5jYMmw9HXipd67XNRqjFdb2hoqAz3eJ-X5iVegwMtYBTA6yvKiXELaNZOJvUsJegGeee-RKs8cmckS8GNBzkv7N0SJAT_dUdE3hQxFFvHG0Ad-eeGIqMq9SM3Zqr1gB0UNq-weTtDGicJnyUpZYY33X1ptGIvng6qwUCQ%3D%3D)**

Will you please consider a gift of $5, $10, $25, or even $100 today to help me get my congressional campaign off the ground? **Right now I have $1,000 in our account, and that isn't going to get me anywhere.**

| [**Chip-In Today
Help Me Fund My Campaign ** **› › **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f23a0481d7fe459787cc1737dee97daa&_e=5J-jxkJAPeqnzpL1fLrNq8eVkqboXl1iOxHZt__HRPYH_-z-Ev9nVA_A0SFCHUk7lKLwRK_XcVqVLn40d0y1iWCMhlRp6vYxdbibQUZvsIRg1VkKs0sAWDzM1z3aHxLgy6OGOwOGX_Ohq4JVz5Q7SL46CnN9yhP6LuNPw1jIghT61SyYWuTW7_GGDtsRPGd1Ji7oe9o_3hXi2RlWxFpyh1WXyP_-XbKKqEUVlOKzprDs2yzv78GeMbvlGeBI_zXl9UPRrZhagcsTpVGnWtMCR8J0uf-gZojRCrbbZ6IP9rApBWvM-FfP5UjYVhYWN4y-14Ma0oJmUsODvXO_1kKYIRmI7TtBi7Xdsot-BalMN_e_pNLFOWJjorcz6UkvS7gH8vuavh2JYXf0qiC790HggaYL65XkOzkNWzhfeAZavZlESknqR73AfzOsEqAd459qbUwsHHwEqyo-7SA9WTuSxA%3D%3D)

Following the events of that day on the Paris-bound train, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film _The 15:17 to Paris,_ **directed by Clint Eastwood.**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f23a0481d7fe459787cc1737dee97daa&_e=5J-jxkJAPeqnzpL1fLrNq8eVkqboXl1iOxHZt__HRPYH_-z-Ev9nVA_A0SFCHUk7lKLwRK_XcVqVLn40d0y1iWCMhlRp6vYxdbibQUZvsIRg1VkKs0sAWDzM1z3aHxLgy6OGOwOGX_Ohq4JVz5Q7SL46CnN9yhP6LuNPw1jIghT61SyYWuTW7_GGDtsRPGd1Ji7oe9o_3hXi2RlWxFpyh1WXyP_-XbKKqEUVlOKzprDs2yzv78GeMbvlGeBI_zXlAsWOWJDhWZldiVAo2_SBWCWGCH7mHjZ9rQegGOOqbaM8FUY95ImbIKHqKOxZ6TQ6yyoa6eRyf7He41P2KlxjABceJM9DSGt_RLP_c8DSJd3dU9CmBb7DVL-OH6S7cuRWpbmR8GacBNspLQCHo_uZkxljMGlCavIi7SVIZY-8_ZWR12NIiEvhZuhFBoEoeQEsYCdfv9KuVdmfpBhJRtEG9A%3D%3D)Anthony Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California.
But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – **I did it out of duty.** And now, duty is calling me again.

I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why **I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington.**

[**Will you lend your support to my fight by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or another amount today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f23a0481d7fe459787cc1737dee97daa&_e=5J-jxkJAPeqnzpL1fLrNq8eVkqboXl1iOxHZt__HRPYH_-z-Ev9nVA_A0SFCHUk7lKLwRK_XcVqVLn40d0y1iWCMhlRp6vYxdbibQUZvsIRg1VkKs0sAWDzM1z3aHxLgy6OGOwOGX_Ohq4JVz5Q7SL46CnN9yhP6LuNPw1jIghT61SyYWuTW7_GGDtsRPGd1Ji7oe9o_3hXi2RlWxFpyh1WXyP_-XbKKqEUVlOKzprDs2yzv78GeMbvlGeBI_zXlsWeAjT1SJ68sQjvB9sWkKcUJYjzYgzWu5wspX9m49xc0N4th0olUAl3OBD0C6ldAddrI8CWmNl9dqGz3fquQWDB11lpbs1HADE-by6O-jQDHGtkGHghE2_cYTBcorYkXp6OTgbXQ4V_pUSDjO_t5_zcWbcsBYo3Uk06OrkdHerDmLzcfNMPmAOw0zhaIjvWSD2Yc-_K7lhaPDGBznIrASg%3D%3D)
