My Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio has prioritized his Washington “values” and radical-socialist colleagues over the constituents of my Oregon community for too long.

DeFazio has received an “F” rating from the National Rifle Association and he vehemently supports the outrageous Green New Deal. His stance on these two issues alone **do not align with our district or with our country.**

I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of my opponent and his radical-Left allies.

**I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear.** The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f23a0481d7fe459787cc1737dee97daa&_e=5J-jxkJAPeqnzpL1fLrNq8eVkqboXl1iOxHZt__HRPYH_-z-Ev9nVA_A0SFCHUk7lKLwRK_XcVqVLn40d0y1iWCMhlRp6vYxdbibQUZvsIRg1VkKs0sAWDzM1z3aHxLgy6OGOwOGX_Ohq4JVz5Q7SL46CnN9yhP6LuNPw1jIghT61SyYWuTW7_GGDtsRPGd1Ji7oe9o_3hXi2RlWxFpyh1WXyP_-XbKKqEUVlOKzprDs2yzv78GeMbvlGeBI_zXlC8sviP2vH1vAsO9Y3q8np61XzvPD2i9VFVc_dfaAwlZwHu5YmgI2cZGg1dC1_6UrPuhpBKBq426bv7tLgxYbnQvpiO9uD8GtFIgMObEY9BQW9nHZ7Soew_-Faq6-EfQDA-XJD1mZlfzvlDMrLBq-pb3FVCELAjdCX31_jw5SZr3wtzGKgmwXkrxs1EX_62lnxgwNzWv5Zx42FIcgNFqAlw%3D%3D)

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f23a0481d7fe459787cc1737dee97daa&_e=5J-jxkJAPeqnzpL1fLrNq8eVkqboXl1iOxHZt__HRPYH_-z-Ev9nVA_A0SFCHUk7lKLwRK_XcVqVLn40d0y1iWCMhlRp6vYxdbibQUZvsIRg1VkKs0sAWDzM1z3aHxLgy6OGOwOGX_Ohq4JVz5Q7SL46CnN9yhP6LuNPw1jIghT61SyYWuTW7_GGDtsRPGd1Ji7oe9o_3hXi2RlWxFpyh1WXyP_-XbKKqEUVlOKzprDs2yzv78GeMbvlGeBI_zXlQC_fr1ZQyORpsLI1XIM1rNFqajXiuKXtE6YhTkTLfdmkizdxB6PxH4jHsXF90zltZeH-o91A3p8Vu7Sp2mrKhXWlyrULNs9VqXGgskWg769c5k4A_xGslrj5Wj5-iHLNQhMqKT04osYAg5rq3L1quCGNO4aYGqDnyvq6faoRZcphVF5pScA1pzXFRHQ5fT7mEST4HoO2yaR92EVUlJoQwA%3D%3D)

clean_body: We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day. Last year I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality long ago. My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need. Recently, I launched my second campaign for Congress and . Republicans are on the cusp of flipping the House - we only need a net gain of FIVE seats - Will you please consider a gift of $5, $10, $25, or even $100 today to help me get my congressional campaign off the ground? Right now I have $1,000 in our account, and that isn't going to get me anywhere. | Following the events of that day on the Paris-bound train, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film The 15:17 to Paris, directed by Clint Eastwood. Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California. But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – I did it out of duty. And now, duty is calling me again. I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington. My Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio has prioritized his Washington “values” and radical-socialist colleagues over the constituents of my Oregon community for too long. DeFazio has received an “F” rating from the National Rifle Association and he vehemently supports the outrageous Green New Deal. His stance on these two issues alone do not align with our district or with our country. I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of my opponent and his radical-Left allies. I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear. The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them. My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

body:
John will *never* stop pushing for equal protection under the law for every American.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210611-1727-header&t=1&akid=1727%2E434096%2EVNRJ6j)
Peter, Pride Month is a _biiiiiig_ deal here on Team Fetterman. 🌈 ✨
**So, John wanted to do something special for this team so we can ALL celebrate together.**[**_We're sending out FREE Team Fetterman Pride stickers to everyone who donates in response to this email. Donate any amount to claim yours, and we'll send you a free Pride sticker right to your doorstep._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20207?refcode=em20210611-1727&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1727%2E434096%2EVNRJ6j)

Expanding rights and protections for the LGBTQIA+ community is a fight that John Fetterman has *always* kept front and center — not just today as he runs to flip this PA Senate seat, but since 2013 when he defied the law to perform marriages for same-sex couples as Mayor of Braddock.
John will never stop pushing for equal protection under the law for every American — and if elected to the Senate, he will always fight boldly, relentlessly, and proudly for LGBTQIA+ rights and freedoms.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: pummeled
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

$3

That is the contribution I am asking you to make to Alex Padilla’s
campaign for U.S. Senate. If you’re ready to chip in to make sure we keep
Alex in office, just use this link:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210611-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=78_159979_LJAkMr&akid=78%2E159979%2ELJAkMr ]https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/June21

Otherwise, let me explain why this request is so important.

As you know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in California
— one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, anti-immigrant
far-right Trump devotees.

And yes, they want to beat me. But they would also LOVE to beat the first
Latino Senator from California — the son of immigrants — and one who
registered millions of voters and expanded access to the ballot as
Secretary of State.

So Alex needs our help. Because you can bet the same deep-pocketed Trump
donors funding the recall are going to set their sights on Alex as well.
They’d love to pummel him with negative ads. And that’s why I have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210611-1-15&t=1002&refcode2=78_159979_LJAkMr&akid=78%2E159979%2ELJAkMr ]Can you make a $3 contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign
for U.S. Senate in California? Do it before his official FEC fundraising
deadline comes to an end.

California, and America, are better with Alex Padilla in the Senate. All
of us have a part in keeping him there.

-Gavin

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Alex Padilla has an important FEC fundraising deadline coming up and he
needs our help posting a big number of donations when it’s done. The press
and the people funding the recall will be watching. So what do you say?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210611-1-15&t=1003&refcode2=78_159979_LJAkMr&akid=78%2E159979%2ELJAkMr ]Contribute $3 to keep Alex Padilla in the Senate

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?source=em210611-1-15&t=1004&refcode2=78_159979_LJAkMr&akid=78%2E159979%2ELJAkMr ]CONTRIBUTE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=78%2E159979%2ELJAkMr

subject: Equity for LGBTQ Americans [your input requested]
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Stephanie Murphy for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30649197/290200348/-1065962055?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk0ZTBjOS1mM2NhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6MfxCZRS7AdQY8s9ao-6FkmoDeXaikbjyCl03G6An8=&emci=98bee307-abc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6a94e0c9-f3ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20387125)

| | How can we achieve equal rights for LBGTQ Americans? | **[TAKE THE SHORT SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30649198/290200349/-352764983?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk0ZTBjOS1mM2NhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6MfxCZRS7AdQY8s9ao-6FkmoDeXaikbjyCl03G6An8=&emci=98bee307-abc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6a94e0c9-f3ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20387125)**
---

Friend --

Tomorrow marks five years since a man with legally obtained firearms entered the Pulse nightclub here in Central Florida and murdered 49 innocent people. At the time, it was the deadliest mass shooting in U.S. history -- and it shook me to my core. After watching my Republican congressman cash a check from the NRA just two days later, I knew I had to take action -- so I ran for Congress.

Now, as we approach five years since the Pulse nightclub attack, I’m taking time to remember the victims -- mostly members of the LGBTQ community -- who were targeted and killed that night. We have made progress as a nation in the fight to end discrimination against LGBTQ people, but we still have a long way to go.

The best way I know to honor their memories is to do all we can to fight for true equality for all people. That's why I cosponsored and voted for the Equality Act. But we can and must do more.

**I’m working hard in Congress to achieve equal rights for all LGBTQ people.[Will you help me during this Pride month by sharing what you think we should be doing to achieve full equality for LGBTQ Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30649199/290200350/-352764983?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk0ZTBjOS1mM2NhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6MfxCZRS7AdQY8s9ao-6FkmoDeXaikbjyCl03G6An8=&emci=98bee307-abc7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6a94e0c9-f3ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20387125)**

Thank you so much,
Stephanie

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30649200/290200351/-774258440?refcode=ris_20210611_e_s_us_na_na_6k&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTk0ZTBjOS1mM2NhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6MfxCZRS7AdQY8s9ao-6FkmoDeXaikbjyCl03G6An8=)**

subject: Grab your yard signs now!

body:
Kevin Faulconer yard signs are available NOW. >>

name: Rand Paul
subject: This is disgraceful...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
| | | | Dear Patriot, Planned Parenthood stole your money to fund abortion. **While working-class families and small businesses struggled to put food on their tables, Planned Parenthood was taking taxpayer loans from the Small Business Administration to support the killing of babies**. After the Small Business Administration determined the obvious -- that Planned Parenthood is not a small business -- they were ordered to return those illegal loans. And they refused! Instead, Planned Parenthood called in decades of favors from Joe Biden in order to hold onto the millions of dollars they swindled from the American taxpayer. And now the Biden Administration is refusing to enforce the law. It is disgraceful that rather than support families in need, the current Small Business Administration supports the abortion industry, in violation of their own rules. **Enough is enough. Taxpayers should not be forced to fund abortion -- and the abortion industry has no right to steal public money.** The abortionists will target me in 2022, and I need your help to fight for Life and against taxpayer funding of abortion. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Bezos, Bloomberg, Buffett, and other billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We already knew the richest people in America weren’t paying their fair share, but this report showed just how widespread the problem is.
#
Peter,
While working families have struggled to put food on the table and pay rent during this devastating pandemic, the rich have only gotten richer and the wealthy have watched their profits skyrocket. It makes this week’s bombshell report from ProPublica about billionaires evading taxes that much more egregious.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210611?refcode=em20210611-362&t=1&refcode2=362_420207_fQMU7q&akid=362%2E420207%2EfQMU7q)
We already knew the richest people in America weren’t paying their fair share, but this report showed just how widespread the problem is — and it revealed the details of how people like Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, Warren Buffett, and Michael Bloomberg get away without paying their taxes.
**This is unacceptable. That’s why I’m working on making sure the rich pay their fair share. I introduced the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act alongside Senator Elizabeth Warren earlier this year.** Our legislation will narrow the racial wealth gap, help level the economic playing field in this country, and ensure that the wealthiest finally begin to pay their fair share. It’ll do all of this while investing trillions of dollars into our communities. And if you have a net worth of less than $50 million, you won’t pay a penny.
[**If we’re going to pass this bill and finally make the wealthiest Americans pay their fair share in taxes, I need you in this fight with me. Chip in $3 or more today to fuel our work to tax the rich and finally make ultra-millionaires and billionaires pay a fair tax rate. It’s time — now let’s make it happen.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210611?refcode=em20210611-362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=362_420207_fQMU7q&akid=362%2E420207%2EfQMU7q)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210611?refcode=em20210611-362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=362_420207_fQMU7q&akid=362%2E420207%2EfQMU7q)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210611-362-footer&t=22&refcode2=362_420207_fQMU7q&akid=362%2E420207%2EfQMU7q)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=362%2E420207%2EfQMU7q)

body:
They know it |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7e11cde213&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

You know an animal is in the corner when it starts lashing out.

**And that is exactly what we are seeing with the Democrats getting their claws out to fight back against America’s Audit in Maricopa County!**

**_70 percent of Maricopa Ballots have been recounted, and now the Democrats are getting scared!_**

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, a pro-Trump Republican, a former police officer, paramedic, first responder, and Arizona business leader.

_I have been endorsed by Bernard Kerik, and I am the Conservative who will fight back against The Democrats long after America’s Audit is over!_

We are in for the long haul.

**One audit isn’t enough. We have to see through to Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, and even Georgia!**

**_And then we need to protect every election after that or the Democrats will never lose!_**

This is why I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona! I will protect the elections from the Steal and make sure that Arizona is the Red State it REALLY is!

[_Donate TODAY to protect America’s and Arizona’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=46076cc269&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cccebd3453&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Let me take you on a tour of the Leftist mania in the media right now!

**“Experts call it a ‘clown show?” What experts? You mean the Democrats who don’t want to lose their precious Joe Biden win?**

**_When the words are vague, you know its fake!_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=20a2b091f9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **538 reports that the Audit is an “inquisition.”**

_Yes, the Spanish Inquisition was famous for their methodical, filmed counting of ballots. That’s what it was, fake news media, keep telling yourselves that._

**_I have never in my life seen people get so angry at something that should make them happy._**

If you are so confident that the election is legitimate, why do you get something at so angry at something, which would, in theory, prove you right?

_Yep folks, definitely nothing to see here!_
[_Join me in combatting media bias against election integrity by donating today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5d2c11d193&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4c4308f368&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Ok, I have a question.

**If Audits were such a big risk then why did Biden just propose an 80 billion dollar tax hike to increase tax audits?**

Audits only cause “lasting damage” if you’re on the wrong side of the law.

**This is ridiculous and this only highlights the idiocy of the Democrats across the board.**

**_They really think Americans will fall for this crap._**

Well, good news here folks, we persist, we find more evidence of fraud by the day, and President Trump is on our side!
---
|
---
| This grass-roots movement is spreading folks and its get in or get out.

**President Trump is on the side of America’s Audit.**

Are you?

[_Donate TODAY to join the movement sweeping Conservative America and help me win Secretary of State of Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5235a57d89&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1270d4a4cc&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=19835bf1b3&e=44b8c466b0)
---

Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

name: Unite the Country
subject: Building back from Donald Trump’s destruction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:
It’s bigger than this moment — add your name and support Joe Biden’s fight for America. | Peter - For four years, Donald Trump destroyed our standing as a leader on the world stage. Our longtime international allies began to turn away from us, and our reputation as a just and free country was damaged. **But now President Biden is rebuilding the U.S. as a world leader.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30650899/290205377/-1201197115?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YzJiMGRkLWY4Y2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a2bbefbYmMFsLuVLx9sUjVwPHBcoSP02KsF42ymbZCQ=&emci=c6bb39bc-f8ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=75c2b0dd-f8ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753) **President Biden already promised to buy 500 million doses of the Pfizer vaccine to donate to help vaccinate people across the globe.** And he is poised to announce his international vaccination plan on his very first international trip as President, working to replicate his success in combating the pandemic here in America all across the world. President Biden knows American ingenuity and manufacturing were essential to developing the vaccines, surpassing his 100-day vaccination goals and getting our country back on the path to recovery. And now, American leadership can usher in an end to this global crisis. We need to show the world that President Biden has the support at home to get his plan up and running — this plan could stop the spread of COVID in its tracks. That’s why we’re calling on 500 grassroots supporters to add their name to our petition before midnight. **[Add your name and show the world you support President Biden as he reimagines America as a leader on the world stage>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30650900/290205378/-1201197115?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YzJiMGRkLWY4Y2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a2bbefbYmMFsLuVLx9sUjVwPHBcoSP02KsF42ymbZCQ=&emci=c6bb39bc-f8ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=75c2b0dd-f8ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753)** **[SIGN ON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30650902/290205379/-1201197115?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YzJiMGRkLWY4Y2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a2bbefbYmMFsLuVLx9sUjVwPHBcoSP02KsF42ymbZCQ=&emci=c6bb39bc-f8ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=75c2b0dd-f8ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753)** Thanks for your support, Unite the Country **[Donate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30650904/290205382/-1089539254?refcode=em_pet_061321_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YzJiMGRkLWY4Y2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a2bbefbYmMFsLuVLx9sUjVwPHBcoSP02KsF42ymbZCQ=)** **[Donate Monthly](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30650907/290205383/-1089539254?refcode=em_pet_061321_footer&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YzJiMGRkLWY4Y2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a2bbefbYmMFsLuVLx9sUjVwPHBcoSP02KsF42ymbZCQ=)**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Can Matt and I call you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey there —
One of the hardest parts about running for office is asking folks to invest their hard-earned dollars in your campaign.
Having come from a working poor family myself, I know what a big decision it is to donate to a cause you care about.
That’s why I’m so humbled and grateful to have support from so many grassroots donors — and I’m hoping you’ll become one of them today, friend.
It means so much that you chose to join the movement we’re building to make a democracy that works for working people like you and me.
I’d love to personally call and thank you and every single person who has joined our campaign, but traveling across the Commonwealth talking to voters is pretty time-consuming.
So I set aside some time this month and asked my team to select a handful of folks who contribute through this email for my partner Dr. Matt and me to call.
**We’d love the chance to hear what’s on your mind and thank you personally for joining our fight for working people. So what do you say?**
[Could you make your first donation to our campaign now for a chance to be one of the grassroots donors Dr. Matt and I call?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30651483/290207143/-347207331?refcode2=2f926316-fbca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210611-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjkyNjMxNi1mYmNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzAAAnCAqMDUJcd1Uu284dPmogs4OFn2CRHdNMDFzno=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30651484/290207144/-347207331?refcode2=2f926316-fbca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210611-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjkyNjMxNi1mYmNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzAAAnCAqMDUJcd1Uu284dPmogs4OFn2CRHdNMDFzno=)**
I hope I can give you a ring soon. Thanks for everything you do to support our campaign.
Best,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

8 Democrats won Municipal races across the state of Mississippi this week. | |

Supporter,
8 Democrats won Municipal races across the state of Mississippi this week.

Obviously, these are not the results we wanted to see if we expect to keep Mississippi Red.

Democrats in Washington are continuing to raise money to target elections in our state specifically.

_**We cannot allow Democrat career politicians to out-fundraise the Mississippi Republican Party!**_

**_Join us today._**

[_**Join Us!**_](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=a5e4926ec75c402bb289245c491d9647&_e=d63wj3aSPGrPWPXSf6-J9zO-dvD5E9JcJnfWB61lE5x0aJjZbClIrR7ZjZMFO_kdgSX80L-iW9uYm4JPa-1j4jn2Y2TCnsWvJv4XoU8W2b7G9FDM9REcsPfsmIe45xms-bgDCufMwf0YOxkmo_ZlPmiRvIc2KpfwfIFgJYgfc_J7ERaWwKQa7QLjP5PaCU_lv9KTwgEv6VvlqJpqrFtNZGvcObhCR8lVUdEwZbcA8qDosqpy6wHKlGgZe4lW8nitNmaRinwXGwnUgCI1z8NiP7EWgnPilKI3sob3mVZ6165MPDyQ0KAHtMdBiqAMWwfj5XpRP241R4Wt7QpbyOBXKHVwHWq6OV50uztEoYyEYpRVePS-0_h0jH1tWRh_CWKY5acO5kZBHhk3BxkvHjyumA%3D%3D)

Frank Bordeaux

clean_body: Today, YouTube suspended Ron Johnson from posting videos on the platform for one week over his remarks touting unproven treatments for COVID-19. | = = Peter, Today, YouTube suspended Ron Johnson from posting videos on the platform for one week over his remarks touting unproven treatments for COVID-19. This comes as no surprise to anyone who has followed Ron Johnson’s career. He’s spent his entire time spewing conspiracy theories and falsehoods about COVID-19. Wisconsin needs a Senator, not a side-show. Ron Johnson continues to embarrass Wisconsin on the national stage, and no matter how radical he is, National Republicans will always rush to his defense. Republicans will throw everything they’ve got to keep this seat in Mitch McConnell’s hands, and we have to continue to build up our grassroots campaign to take on him and his special-interest funding. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = -Team Lasry | ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: re: Required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised over the past three months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We don’t have a rolodex of well-connected Democratic donors to turn to.
#
The FEC is already counting down the days until the end of Q2.
**In a matter of weeks, Erica Smith will be required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised over the past three months.**
Once our numbers go public, everyone and anyone will make judgements about the strength and viability of our scrappy North Carolina campaign.
But unlike all the moderate candidates for Senate in 2022, right now **Erica doesn’t have the backing of the Democratic Establishment.** We don’t have a rolodex of well-connected Democratic donors to turn to.
Instead, we’re relying on you. Erica is not the establishment candidate, but the people’s candidate.
[**_You’ve never donated to our campaign before. Can we count on you to make your very first donation of $5 or more to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate before the Q2 deadline? Your donation has a direct and immediate impact on electing North Carolina’s first Black woman senator and posting a strong fundraising number by the end of Q2._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2612?refcode=em20210611-164&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=164%2E3698%2ElXdOIa)

Thanks for hearing us out,
Erica Smith HQ

subject: “Tom Nelson is clever and hard-working, but he’s not shown the ability to raise money, or much money in the past”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Some Wisconsin political experts were talking about our race. They said:
“Tom Nelson is probably the hardest-working person in politics.”
How nice! We love it when people shout out Tom — and they even mentioned his success in Fox Valley where races are won and lost in Wisconsin! However, they said this after:
“Tom Nelson is clever and hard-working, but he’s not shown the ability to raise money, or much money in the past”
**Well, that’s because Tom doesn't cater to Wall Street or billionaires. As one of the only non-millionaires in this race, our campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you,_not millionaires on Wall Street._**

[We _can_ raise the money to defeat Ron Johnson through grassroots support. clean_body: | | Some Wisconsin political experts were talking about our race. They said: “Tom Nelson is probably the hardest-working person in politics.” How nice! We love it when people shout out Tom — and they even mentioned his success in Fox Valley where races are won and lost in Wisconsin! However, they said this after: “Tom Nelson is clever and hard-working, but he’s not shown the ability to raise money, or much money in the past” Well, that’s because Tom doesn't cater to Wall Street or billionaires. As one of the only non-millionaires in this race, our campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you,not millionaires on Wall Street. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We’re proud of the fact that this campaign is not self-funding or relying on Wall Street. If political experts ding us for that, so be it. The bottom line is that Tom will continue to work hard to deliver real, compassionate leadership from Wisconsin to the U.S. Senate. We’re going to do that with you, not Wall Street multi-millionaires by our side. = Thank you for hearing me out, Irene Lin | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Ron Johnson's tinfoil hat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter, Ron Johnson apparently decided to put his tinfoil hat back on... again.

First, he went on Sean Hannity's _Fox News_ program to call President Biden weak -- and then, he got on Twitter to spread some wild conspiracy theories. He's had a busy day!

Look, Ron Johnson is more focused on being a conspiracy theorist than he is on doing right by Wisconsin families. We can't afford a senator who's too distracted to do his job, doesn't listen to the experts, and peddles dangerous lies as fact.

I'm about as different from Ron Johnson as you can get. That's why I'm running to replace him. Instead of conspiracy theories and Trumpism, I believe in science, ending the filibuster, banning LGBTQ+ discrimination, protecting voting rights, raising the minimum wage... I mean, the list just keeps going.

I'm going to make sure we say goodbye forever to Ron Johnson's conspiracy theories and once again put Wisconsin families first. But no one runs for Senate alone. I'll need your help. **[Rush a donation of $5 or more to help us raise the resources we need to get the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30652752/290210887/1978118503?gpsid=50_130_19372&refcode=em21_210611_Tweet_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210611_Tweet_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTRmNjRhNi1mZmNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UvHKOhZ2KRTk-URCIUvU2iubUCs4hTr0_gVIcBsheKA=)**

name: Karen Bass
subject: Why we need Sharice's voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team, I'd like to take a moment to lift up my colleague and friend, Representative Sharice Davids (KS-03).

When Sharice was elected in 2018, she became Kansas' FIRST openly lesbian member of Congress and one of our nation's first-ever Native American women elected to serve in the House. To say Sharice has been breaking down barriers since day one would be an understatement.

Sharice's district is also one of the most competitive seats in Congress. She's a member of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee's Frontline program, meaning our Democratic House majority hinges on defending Sharice's seat in 2022.

**[Republicans are planning to spend whatever it takes to flip Sharice's district from blue to red. So we need to show the GOP that Sharice has a strong team by her side who is ready to defend her seat. Will you join me in rushing support to Sharice's grassroots campaign before our mid-month deadlines?](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdoDUFshJLA_5urp8mjS8Pp3G5qNxmd4aJOvaQx6vYk=/p86CgeXVkMrCuMWpO7v2jDjEW4208j3wRfMXubXc4CA=?gpsid=39_132_19362&refcode=em21_210611_dvds_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210611_dvds_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Our House majority isn't the only thing at stake. Extremists in the Kansas legislature introduced a law that nearly banned transgender athletes from playing on school sports teams for girls and women. Meanwhile, **Sharice was the _only_ member of Kansas' Congressional Delegation to vote in favor of the Equality Act.**

We need Sharice's voice in the House. She's a leader who is truly representative of the American people's values and is leading the fight for equality in Congress this Pride Month, and every day.

**[Will you split a donation between our campaigns today? Early investments are how we won in 2018 and 2020, and we're counting on your support again to help us defend the majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdoDUFshJLA_5urp8mjS8Pp3G5qNxmd4aJOvaQx6vYk=/p86CgeXVkMrCuMWpO7v2jDjEW4208j3wRfMXubXc4CA=?gpsid=39_132_19362&refcode=em21_210611_dvds_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210611_dvds_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Onward,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdoDUFshJLA_5urp8mjS8Pp3G5qNxmd4aJOvaQx6vYk=/p86CgeXVkMrCuMWpO7v2jDjEW4208j3wRfMXubXc4CA=?gpsid=39_132_19362&refcode=em21_210611_dvds_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210611_dvds_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

Meanwhile, Sharice was the only member of Kansas' Congressional Delegation to vote in favor of the Equality Act. We need Sharice's voice in the House. She's a leader who is truly representative of the American people's values and is leading the fight for equality in Congress this Pride Month, and every day. Onward, Karen Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today. It’s time we get back to our foundational values, cut across partisan lines, and solve problems by working together to get our nation’s economy moving again. I need to run into a meeting, Peter, but I’m hoping you were able to see my last email. Thanks, Peter. Lisa Scheller \--------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, Did you see the news last week? Take a look for yourself: Once again, this month’s jobs report was missed by 100,000 jobs, coming in just after a jobs report that was missed by 740,000 jobs! Peter–the United States’ jobs reports continue to miss the mark from what experts estimated. To be frank, this shouldn’t be shocking under this Administration, but it is disappointing to know that there are HUNDREDS of thousands of people across our nation who are being PAID to sit at home to not work! I ran for Congress last year on a message of strong border security. In the end,**_I fell short by just 6,588 votes_**. Now, I’m running again in what will surely be one of the most hotly contested races of the 2022 election. Why? **Because the guy I’m running against will vote for Amnesty the day Biden/Harris submit it for a vote**.

subject: My interview with Donald Trump
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=19d51ee12a594359af6636e81c78e154&_e=SR0_-Q-DN13gxOPyNj-gJ3QNloHfY7Xtqob-H9Jm443s81ig3WQ_hDTNbEoeEFn9vdio2LuKRYjVYOY-gbXF7fxvHmwBjCIGPbmlG7zyjpwcNNpK1EjZECEQlfSJ3RRCCkVUKkDV36HgAWD9EuHpaddt2pfVCXGIfpDSRK8GFWmhCZ8VQDDnTrrFVUWPPY62om-jaIh92xXjiAX1se6bwYfPCeoybUc_VGeCWIZt4X4g3wrHBxeyRY77L_4nRV9raBSTYo-zEC-T57euegQgk-3t-G0RTJhMkInvbmSMaPP6QkdjKtyp1VTDO4oYS_0qM0YRATdGYe9zXIy-oUPvxn59lR3OixDbi8qNho1vpoG8qYmNx4JmxMCI1v5cZ6X2IgA4IVYLup01_cizHbYazA%3D%3D) Fellow freedom-loving American, **President Donald Trump gave The Daily Wire an exclusive opportunity to interview him on my new show, _Candace_.** This never-before-heard interview — in which I ask President Trump if he’s going to run in 2024, and if so, if he’ll consider me for vice president — is now available only to subscribers of The Daily Wire. **[Click here to hear what Trump has to say about his 2024 announcement and so much more. For a very limited time, I’m offering you 20% off your Daily Wire subscription with the code “CANDACESHOW” because I know this is an interview you don’t want to miss.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=19d51ee12a594359af6636e81c78e154&_e=SR0_-Q-DN13gxOPyNj-gJ3QNloHfY7Xtqob-H9Jm443s81ig3WQ_hDTNbEoeEFn9vdio2LuKRYjVYOY-gbXF7fxvHmwBjCIGPbmlG7zyjpwcNNpK1EjZECEQlfSJ3RRCCkVUKkDV36HgAWD9EuHpaddt2pfVCXGIfpDSRK8GFWmhCZ8VQDDnTrrFVUWPPY627y-KIGObEJVKNe00k8lygG-1k5NBak5nz28VQDRstj2vW1vXX0lFWCmrJq7UAoaa_dcLlHV0eWpxrLpxc9nLECZl-tsNR9hU3Yjt7-cBRt14eJrxWpya_F8ZFpd4pVgBNj8fC5vZeAKwgTgfyyFBTiiYcJ7EEcFCMimNrS2ginbXal9vWnDNC977Ajc2wKI5zzMbZ1sIs9mTYAiMa_nUJA%3D%3D)** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=19d51ee12a594359af6636e81c78e154&_e=SR0_-Q-DN13gxOPyNj-gJ3QNloHfY7Xtqob-H9Jm443s81ig3WQ_hDTNbEoeEFn9vdio2LuKRYjVYOY-gbXF7fxvHmwBjCIGPbmlG7zyjpwcNNpK1EjZECEQlfSJ3RRCCkVUKkDV36HgAWD9EuHpaddt2pfVCXGIfpDSRK8GFWmhCZ8VQDDnTrrFVUWPPY62CKYkUGE1DXUvntQJkNE8JT0RQ-bajykjtYxfx_gfHbdXYs7YO-uiajiz5fmRvm7fhYmS41KMx0g7VdnP-vWyupPTNqn2jY5qw74lnfQ0Jq9h8CPAk_WYwurR-BLVkK-PALUQNlhlNOuc3xrtUj0Ild6aROiJTNGq4t1zrR5E_8ZMbr6ViaLUKLP2EDqc5NoaRvqaLPNKvt9vyp1h4qE1AA%3D%3D) [**Access my exclusive Trump interview!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=19d51ee12a594359af6636e81c78e154&_e=SR0_-Q-DN13gxOPyNj-gJ3QNloHfY7Xtqob-H9Jm443s81ig3WQ_hDTNbEoeEFn9vdio2LuKRYjVYOY-gbXF7fxvHmwBjCIGPbmlG7zyjpwcNNpK1EjZECEQlfSJ3RRCCkVUKkDV36HgAWD9EuHpaddt2pfVCXGIfpDSRK8GFWmhCZ8VQDDnTrrFVUWPPY62jBgW5pfKsLqIpC939kHlWTlEMS080y-MF8kQKywItyHSyFN05krSZZ9bEV4K_PhvAgx-Swc9l2Xx9F5g9dYxuCd9B5rj0RlFkCD3NRlOEE19AJVBdm7yzStfVV9ZkSQjAOKWJguI6FWd4-guuf_3fIYOhlo1NgAFeIwUxcKvtuSIjHLn1xkuC9NSBJjslv1n-2XuV-r5byzabco5DtndFA%3D%3D) In my first interview... yes, there could be more... with President Trump, he answered questions he has _not_ addressed in other interviews. So the only place you’ll get this unique information is at The Daily Wire. During our conversation we discussed:
* His 2024 announcement
* A Trump/Owens 2024 ticket
* How popular culture flipped on Trump
* The impact of the biased media on Melania

name: Team AOC
subject: Something BIG is coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We have a big milestone in just a few weeks, and we could use your help.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210611-2213-header&t=1&akid=2213%2E2526796%2EP4om88)
In just three weeks, we have a huge milestone for the campaign. It’ll be the second official quarterly fundraising deadline of the election cycle.
That means we’ll submit a public report to the FEC about how much we’ve raised in the last three months. This report gets scrutinized heavily, so it’s important for us to be able to post strong numbers.
**Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted Democrats in Congress.** Right-wing outlets like Fox News spend countless hours trying to stoke outrage about her policy agenda. And last cycle, Republicans spent more than $10 million trying to kick her out of Congress.
There’s a lot coming up – from big legislative pushes around infrastructure to voting rights. That’s why we’re writing today asking for your support before the FEC report is due.
[Can you make a $3 contribution right now to help us get on track to reach our fundraising goal for Team AOC before the end-of-quarter deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210611-1?refcode=em20210611-2213-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=2213_2526796_P4om88&akid=2213%2E2526796%2EP4om88)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210611-1?refcode=em20210611-2213-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2213_2526796_P4om88&akid=2213%2E2526796%2EP4om88)**
Alexandria doesn’t raise money the old-school way at fancy parties with wealthy donors or from corporate PACs that write checks in exchange for legislative tradeoffs. She relies 100% on grassroots fundraising to keep up her fight in Congress. Our average donation is just about $17.
**More than 1-in-3 of our campaign dollars come from generous supporters giving over emails like this one.** It’s a critical funding source for us. That’s why we’re writing today ahead of this big end-of-quarter FEC deadline.
[Please, if you can afford it, make a $3 contribution to help Team AOC reach our goals now before our deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210611-1?refcode=em20210611-2213-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2213_2526796_P4om88&akid=2213%2E2526796%2EP4om88)
\- Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210611-1?refcode=em20210611-2213-P&t=23&refcode2=2213_2526796_P4om88&akid=2213%2E2526796%2EP4om88)**

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, The campaign continues to grow and gain momentum as we head into summer. With some great stops in Central Ohio, a continued emphasis on our first in the nation field program, more conservative endorsements from across the state, and talking directly to voters about the issues they care about, Jane continues to prove why she is the grassroots, America First candidate Ohio needs. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane Timken Knows How to Shatter a Glass Ceiling** As you know, Jane was the first woman to run a major party in the State of Ohio. She knows how to shatter a glass ceiling and she knows how to be successful once she does. As Chair, she delivered sweeping electoral victories in 2018, pulled the party out of financial difficulty, and spearheaded a 2020 campaign that delivered Ohio’s electoral votes to President Trump and grew the number of female State Representatives from 9 to 15 in 2020. The Columbus Dispatch highlighted her success this week as well as her bid to become the first female Senator from the great state of Ohio. “The U.S. Senate candidate became the first woman to run the Ohio Republican Party, rising to political prominence with the backing of former President Donald Trump. She spent years working behind the scenes for the state and Stark County GOP before launching her first election bid.” “Timken describes herself as someone who won't sit on the sidelines and said job losses, turmoil at the border and an increase in federal spending motivated her to run for Senate. She doesn't define her candidacy by gender, she said, and wants voters to judge her policies and leadership skills at the ballot box.” [Read the full piece here.](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=d32dc4f3e18840ed85797caa6893739e&_e=1RifE8RWEWABkyM0msJutpL6qri4C8cfX2RknsOI0qP5DyswAvk2q1DkCJIoSzJjuP-IJaE5AgTB7Ecne6zuM8_Iec2OgdcjDxfJ756J17oU1mUGSA4Q80TLmmrLeAofEGwfsSwGbuSQqjvBBxQKr1lqEZ9Av48UyKYtOzio_tifJdi4eaqaMCL3JGP-ZY4nrxVmf4nZOAC2v6fqwXKw1ooSnjl-PZJNTf3xxLmDerdZshbbNvhrQpGrO8okDEYrpcz83ciqqMQPpCvKRHqXsBYYbXmK6vI03J81-5t-yUi04NwQ0e8WRc_Q2WpNVQ6iF-S9yLyNcUDbN7-jME9HoAzP1bKNX1GCcRU8-jWwxNyIyQ4h_JA4-zmB9gmoJxCf) **From the Trail** Last Saturday, Jane spoke to an enthusiastic group of young Republicans at the Ohio Young Republican Convention in Columbus. These young leaders in the party mean the future of our party is bright! Jane had two events in Central Ohio this week with supporters as she continues to crisscross the state. Jane’s message is resonating throughout the state and support just continues to grow! Our fantastic group of interns and volunteers continued their great work calling voters and knocking on their door to spread our America First message. Jane was able to visit with a group of them in Columbus this week between stops. The enthusiasm from this group translates to conversations with voters at their doors and always gives Jane a shot of energy as she travels the state. **Latest Endorsements** The outpouring of support Jane continues to receive speaks to the relationships fostered as Party Chair and the strong, grassroots organization she is building across the state. These endorsements bring her statewide coalition to over 130 conservative leaders. "As a Republican Woman, it makes me so proud to see another strong female Republican step up to the plate and run for office. We need more women's voices fighting for the issues that affect our families and communities. I strongly believe that Jane Timken is the best voice for Ohio. She has my full endorsement." - **Michelle Hung, Lorain County Commissioner** _Full List of This Week’s Endorsements_ Barbara Moore, Adams County Commissioner Cindi Henry, Belmont County Auditor Nancy Aichholz, Hamilton County GOP Finance Chair Michelle Hung, Lorain County Commissioner Gloria Rodgers, Summit County Council Member **The Woke Education Agenda** A few weeks ago, Jane kicked off a statewide listening tour on our schools and the Left pushing their “woke” agenda like Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project. Jane took the lead on this issue because as she has traveled the state, this is the number one issue she is hearing about from concerned mothers and fathers. Instead of teaching the facts of our history – the good, the bad, and the ugly – critical race theory promotes a slanted view of America through a racial and ideological lens. The Left is seeking to stoke racial flames by creating a state of perpetual division between our neighbors, friends, and communities. That’s why I wanted you to see this powerful video from a Chinese woman in Loudoun County, VA who suffered under the brutul Communist Chinese regime of Mo Tse-Tung. She vehemently denounced this dangerous curriculum in our schools drawing direct comparisons to the Chinese Cultural Revolution. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=d32dc4f3e18840ed85797caa6893739e&_e=1RifE8RWEWABkyM0msJutrB6rgbjJ5_jOiBDdWtkjhRO9jH8tdtHae-C5NFxH1NdOHeh5YxwwE5gPa7FU3xNgyUjImoDM-8CXfS4t5wMmX-nrHbrgdUXfHkke2ZmXAY7etak0CpaAOtyOd4kMKbD5GPV7qr_V1ucZxOhT_qM7GOaL08Tw93JCCbSu_5v8XI3GBnC1SPk5OKc6Pw_uMOsnIh8jlJKk29T5lhMWkHuXPEUxmDfLj0kKohgP67WO5a3O8OIQtLIp3ragfIsvfRWAEwhporBDxQ7okDrB2EVQR8%3D)
A good education is what allowed Jane, the daughter and granddaughter of immigrants, to achieve her American Dream. As a U.S. Senator, Jane will unapologetically and fiercely defend your children’s right to the best education so that they can live theirs.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio
Don't want to receive our emails anymore? clean_body: | | | | Check it out Friend, Our campaign just released a new video and I want you to be one of the first people to see it! Every Alaskan’s story is unique. Mine started in the 1970s when my parents moved here. They were homeless for a while, but eventually they made it into the middle class. These days, though, they wouldn’t have that same opportunity... That’s because Alaska and our way of life is under attack. Joe Biden and the Radical Liberals in DC are killing our jobs, stealing our freedom, and threatening the special quality of life that we cherish here in Alaska. Meanwhile,Liberal Lisa Murkowski has done nothing to stop the DC Insiders.In fact, she’s decided to put their interests before ours! I’m running FOR Alaska. I’m running so that every Alaskan has the same opportunity that my parents had - to work an honest job, put a roof over their head, and offer the same opportunities that I had growing up here in Alaska. Together, we can take back this seat and give it back to the people of Alaska and bring our America First Conservative values to the Senate. For Alaska, Kelly P.S. -- Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! kellyforak.com | | | | ==

name: Tim Burchett
subject: I’m Taking On The Anti-Israel Left 🙅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=973baf2aa39746a582c32e1a5644ba78&_e=x-y9JtVhewmbuScLNhvomrr8EmfZdLHQupHblrORK5KS6B7YQ3HYde_C88o9F18wWSoq611Ppu6WNzHX-a7HfTNO0fUU8q1X_RVQToqmXblzKrkBTzSU9VgKlRK4YZ_LJagPvDJoQblt0F8R7uIKpNBrcxIZ7025szJb1INcvp8e0MCdApDvUm6vDWccIsDrCy932y4Q7N5virsthnq-dDj1PGsI0KW-MY6bg_YaF6xHrieVn67ZXeuHFKYztjgRTWkIJfGg84ehEHjWE4VFRQfnd_307-QJQ6xVCxByJjE%3D) **I’m Taking On The Anti-Israel Left 🙅****
** _Photo courtesy of Washington Free Beacon_ Earlier this year, I [sent a letter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=973baf2aa39746a582c32e1a5644ba78&_e=x-y9JtVhewmbuScLNhvomlodki_ifD7yjCgRSBzjuJ1qaR-W9HPlMqOFdhI47DAByr6yG6L_6Qs3Sf_P4mud4k7mxPBbTYtqcM2SGdZH8XmcZ_pr1hv5_1Fmnnvn7Bl_giydtH9T7d9fAtMfTtpVXzm623O19Y1cxH-FT15EQMfUO9cDh0TOXyiGfq2-vlBwpTdCLYZVeWFFa-RPK8vcoRSYEYxnESaLbBAMiogy1MPfpanKqMZ4a1F6W3pCXF3AV45JIvT-IHU1vN4O_XxpVTD5eccUlx5xnRpSNQ24nUV9dIGZbe9zIjUssVD1ZM98GDRR2PCg2NA6ukXvkwYdhJ59q7KMspxE50Xc04mjWDlD1LN3Ru0x6joRDm7BgFMB) to the Treasury and Justice Departments calling on them to investigate ActBlue’s connection to the Palestinian Campaign for the Academic and Cultural Boycott of Israel (PACBI). PACBI is an anti-Israel organization with ties to terror groups. It uses the liberal donation platform ActBlue to solicit donations. I don’t know about you, but that set off alarm bells in my head. **The Justice Department's response? Crickets. ** **We didn’t give up.** Where there’s smoke, there’s fire. This week, I [asked the FBI](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=973baf2aa39746a582c32e1a5644ba78&_e=x-y9JtVhewmbuScLNhvomh6_v8zCFKQKfcwVDChBfuLkpmKB5PWtNjzi6ecbxEuoJ1P1UBQdD-lmqHS8ZhkGYRdH0pmvMkHUd_AN7CrcnmKlEVVOzXt-dw5GT9s9fpcT4EBdxVCdw67rVzl4VzlAxEAe8R_Mrj37PiuopqJfjW3uaRz_a4JopZ45dWrnjkzun5K2F_J5WvJGFBd55_t92ZRUIr5qA5v89IPgYDwdugmaJDIUIzxq_DuwTwZEf9FSshN30lRvmbDiD1ZFhKg0ikOQVqFv7h6rIKbT4PacEi1X1G38uysxj2LEFNcJMYcqX4mq8f4PJR_fNHMgPVpMuf9BzVTAZPse2L0ocx3YYBc%3D) to investigate any connection between known terrorist groups and PACBI, which has been a central hub for the anti-Semitic Boycott, Divestment, and Sanctions (BDS) movement. Fellow House Foreign Affairs Committee members Greg Steube (R-FL) and Maria Salazar (R-FL) joined me in this effort. If PACBI is tied to terror groups like Hamas, ActBlue would be in violation of U.S. anti-terrorism laws. Donating to terrorist groups has no place in our free and democratic country. → **Read more** : GOP lawmakers seek FBI investigation into terror-tied BDS charity ([Washington Free Beacon](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=973baf2aa39746a582c32e1a5644ba78&_e=x-y9JtVhewmbuScLNhvomh6_v8zCFKQKfcwVDChBfuLkpmKB5PWtNjzi6ecbxEuoJ1P1UBQdD-lmqHS8ZhkGYRdH0pmvMkHUd_AN7CrcnmKlEVVOzXt-dw5GT9s9fpcT4EBdxVCdw67rVzl4VzlAxHjbbvTeIIhIp-_V_ifxatbp7MUsZSPX18QtvNHgJHLjDSSwCptubUcG9k3VUBDGRreGcWkoSrb0RbjQmmMNxE1rpwzNTLoZPUFZkM1OUEoElJKwdxRqHSB0-YpGIgPzN_V7nVttjIlJTbzjRoC7UpKGeqBI0sUA-p4wvbKdjkMwPWLY7p_46_ODWnaHwJ7C9fVThWHd8ng-nTvwDCb6lOU%3D)) **→****Read my letter**[**here**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=973baf2aa39746a582c32e1a5644ba78&_e=x-y9JtVhewmbuScLNhvomlVwdMoN5SA8gOz4uW57olkUcDNdNOQGzIMlLJNn_QHwT6lExtDZWfCs7cWb6e2-h1niQXdXBnay5EXO_RSp_gxB4a2gIbtPatnYKiJHim21UqGDfSnN3TFdg-iElPls1qQp2CtBtIQmd6zp8Tpj2F54b0cAA52IjwCR1NH1IHLBUPNC_4sX6gLHCBzMkff7Q7ZMyohv6V3MZTMJaxcm6Ct8vtQhlNilgTAkykK2h631ZdisApi8MTKt7toSanVlRiPFkSqLRNzvoPf9TX7duscc_-PnqffUNM_SeHSmTAU09FjLcvHCWahG2YfFNde5MBJmT-gVYv6J4Q2xJyY8bmg%3D) | |

**Blount County Prepares for 2022 🗳️
**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=973baf2aa39746a582c32e1a5644ba78&_e=x-y9JtVhewmbuScLNhvomgcQ2Ul6jVmbiYN1fm-fNOiiIw0Zn97ykSxhul6Lp7Rrol8DoM-yhg7a0jLYOAcVb4DUM8QED50R-zS93mgtBm8BPdQp9FSDvePXocf16T7twvOpdh_-S1jbxpTt9oS5w20a7IKWZx1mY8YnNVLwZ8EMptRw2ZgUb4bK6njalBGISgm8rXpic_rFHxktxdRdZBuJeVGFsNEqQ9Eki1oYFk7anD_Lb4GzkZOqvMHGwVcU8vW9DDjN2-kzZ2hBnHHsC6AiVPIkT7SGITyAwO6YI_4ek46snkRaP326kt4uuix3Cd7rBBMJeIHEQeupbTkY5ttpkHWwD6TNSKMGMdT35NNQw1rVDjlbIaTJjwwwBnZmcbKUWDnti4oOiqUogrr_B6Ufg2g6ve8phy1MUfUUcu_SDAEhQLQ9YWU8F_yHGtfa)
One of my favorite parts of my job is getting to know devoted conservatives in our district. It was a pleasure to speak at Thursday night’s Blount County GOP re-organizational meeting. I covered the importance of electing Republicans and being actively involved in our elections. We spoke about the importance of not taking elections for granted and getting the next generation involved. Thank you Blount County for a wonderful night.
|

It was a pleasure to speak at Thursday night’s Blount County GOP re-organizational meeting. I covered the importance of electing Republicans and being actively involved in our elections. We spoke about the importance of not taking elections for granted and getting the next generation involved. Thank you Blount County for a wonderful night. | Just For Fun 🎉 → France is sending a new Statue of Liberty to the U.S. for July 4, but this time it's mini 🗽 () → This policeman made this skunk’s day 🦨 () → Could this be the perfect wave? 🌊 () | Check Out The Burchett Store 👕 Need some Team Burchett swag? We’re here to help. We have hats, t-shirts, and stickers so you can support our campaign and our shared conservative values in style. | Thank you for supporting my work in Congress. Please consider a donation today so we can continue fighting for our values. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

| | | Hey Derek-

The Virginia Justice Democrats are very excited to congratulate our VAJD candidates who won on Tuesday! [We look forward to helping you win in November and for your continued fight for Justice: ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=a37d1c728b&e=76fc145c69)

- Delegate Elizabeth Guzman - HD 31
- Katie Sponsler - HD 66
- Nadarius Clark - HD 79
\- Ramin Fatehi - Norfolk City Commonwealth's Attorney
---
|

---
|
---
---
| [Help us elect this Justice Democrats in November. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=061e8f4192&e=76fc145c69)
We would like to thank all of our candidates who ran this cycle. Most importantly, we would like to thank Jennifer Carroll Foy for leading the charge statewide for the progressive movement. We're immensely proud of your historic campaign and all you have done!
---
|
---
| VAJD would like to thank our candidates who ran for LG this cycle: Delegate Sam Rasoul, Delegate Elizabeth Guzman, and Sean Perryman. You brought the values and tenets of our platform to the forefront of the LG race and pushed the tough conversations that many candidates didn't want to have.
---
|
---
|
We would also like to thank all of our House candidates that stepped up to be changemakers in their own communities. We hope that our House candidates will continue to push the issues and hold our elected officials accountable in their districts moving forward:

\- Idris O'Conner - HD 31
\- Kara Pitek - HD 31
\- Jennifer Adeli - HD 34
\- Holly Hazard - HD 38
\- Karishma Mehta - HD 49
\- Richard Walker - HD 71
\- Hannah Kinder - HD 89
\- Zach Filtz - HD 99

|

---
|
---
| Thank you to Meronne Teklu for being one of our local candidates in the Alexandria City Council Race! Local elections matter!
---
|
---
| Finally: Thank you to Delegate Ibraheem Samirah for his service in the House of Delegates these past 2 years Ibraheem has helped pushed campaign finance reform, the Green New Deal for Virginia, Repealing Right to Work, & single-payer healthcare coverage. We look forward to your next move.
---
|
---
|
Our Co-Chair Matt Royer wrote [a retrospective on Tuesday's primary election](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=02fcb9f61d&e=76fc145c69). Progressives have more work to do in the election and we have only just begun.

[If you want to help us reach this goal of working on a statewide movement with our coalition partners, please consider donating $5, $10, $25, $100, or anything you can afford right now. We have more work to do. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=7fa0cda54c&e=76fc145c69)

In solidarity,
Virginia Justice Democrats

name: Tom Fitton
subject: New Fauci Wuhan Emails
body:
Cuomo COVID Cover-up

[INSIDE JW]

UNDER DR. FAUCI NIAID GAVE WUHAN LAB $826K FOR BAT CORONAVIRUS
RESEARCH

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=25124&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9ZeTVSNnFzWno1VT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYxMTIyMjcyOA==]

We’re now learning that U.S officials, using your tax dollars, were
more deeply involved with the notorious Wuhan Lab in China than anyone
knew. The agency headed by Dr. Anthony Fauci is reluctantly revealing
the details only because we sued them. Here is a progress report.

We obtained 280 pages of documents from the Department of Health and
Human Services revealing that from 2014 to 2019, $826,277 was given to
the Wuhan Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research by the
National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), which
is headed by Dr. Anthony Fauci.

The documents, some of which were redacted or withheld in their
entirety, were obtained through a Freedom of Information Act
(FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=22826&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmloLXd1aGFuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYxMTIyMjcyOA==]
seeking
records of communications, contracts and agreements with the Wuhan

China’s Wuhan Institute of Virology, a global leader in virus
research, is a key partner for the United States in protecting global
health security. Its role as operator of the just-launched Biosafety
Level 4 (or ‘P4’) lab- the first such lab in China – opens up
even more opportunities for expert exchange, especially in light of
the lab’s shortage of trained staff.

***

In the last year, the lab also hosted visits from the National
Institutes of Health, National Science Foundation, and experts from
the University of Texas Medical Branch in Galveston. The institute
reports to the Chinese Academy of Sciences in Beijing.

P4 Lab is Open and Transparent, Officials Emphasize

***

Officials described the lab as a “regional node” in the global
biosafety system and said it would play an emergency response role in
an epidemic or pandemic. The lab’s English brochure highlighted a
national security role, saying that it is “an effective measure to
improve China’s availability in safeguarding national bio-safety if
[a] possible biological warfare or terrorist attack happens.”

Institute officials said there would be “limited availability” for
international and domestic scientists who had gone through the
necessary approval process to do research at the lab. They stressed
that the lab aimed to be a “worldwide, open platform” for
virology. They said they welcomed U.S. Centers for Disease Control
(CDC) experts, noting that the Chinese Academy of Sciences was not
strong on human disease expertise, having only focused on it in the
last 15 years, after the SARS outbreak. A Wuhan-based French consulate
official who works on science and technology cooperation with China
also emphasized that the lab, which was initiated in 2004 as a
France-China joint project, was meant to be “open and transparent”
to the global scientific community. “The intent was to set up a lab
to international standards, and open to international research,” he
said. French experts have provided guidance and biosafety training to
the lab, which will continue, the French official said. Institute
officials said that France provided the lab’s design and much of its
technology, but that it is entirely China-funded and has been
completely China-run since a “handover” ceremony in 2016.

In addition to French assistance, experts from the NIH-supported P4
lab at the University of Texas Medical Branch in Galveston have
trained Wuhan lab technicians in lab management and maintenance,
institute officials said.... One Wuhan Institute of Virology
researcher trained for two years at the Galveston lab, and the
institute also sent one scientist to U.S. CDC headquarters in Atlanta
for six months’ work on influenza.

NIH-Supported Research Revises SARS Origin Story

NIH was a major funder, along with the National Science Foundation of
China (NSFC), of SARS research by the Wuhan Institute of Virology’s
[redacted.]

***

Ready to Help with the Global Virome Project

Institute officials expressed strong interest in the Global Virome
Project (GVP), and said Chinese funding for the project would likely
come from Chinese Academy of Sciences funding already earmarked for
One Belt, One Road-related initiatives.... GVP aims to launch this
year as an international collaborative effort to identify within ten
years virtually all of the planet’s viruses that have pandemic or
epidemic potential and the ability to jump to humans. “We hope China
will be one of the leading countries to initiate the Global Virome
Project,” one Wuhan Institute of Virology official said. China
attended a GVP unveiling meeting in January in Thailand and is waiting
for more details of the initiative. The officials said that the
Chinese government funds projects similar to GVP to investigate the
background of viruses and bacteria. This essentially constituted
China’s own Virome Project ...

***

U.S.-China Workshop Explores Research Partnerships

***

Some workshop participants also expressed skepticism about the Global
Virome Project’s (GVP) approach, saying that gaining a predictive
understanding of viruses with pandemic potential would require going
beyond the GVPs strategy of sample collection, to take an
“ecological” approach that considers the virome beyond vertebrate
systems to identify mechanisms driving pathogen evolution. A follow-on
workshop will be held in June at the University of Berkeley.

NSF and NSFC hope to jointly announce a funding call for collaborative
projects later this year.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES INTELLIGENCE DIRECTOR AND STATE DEPARTMENT OVER
WUHAN LAB

Many U.S. government agencies have had a hand in the pandemic, as we
are only now learning. The latest: the director of national
intelligence and the State Department. Judicial Watch is doing a
comprehensive investigation into the origin of the coronavirus.

We filed FOIA suits against the Office of the Director of National
Intelligence (ODNI) and the State Department for information on the
Wuhan Institute of Virology and the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus
(_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Office of the Director of National
Intelligence
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=25126&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtb2RuaS13dWhhbi1jb3ZpZC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDE1MTUvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MTEyMjI3Mjg=
(No. 1:21-cv-01515)), (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of
State
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=25114&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtd3VoYW4tY292aWQtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxNTE2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYxMTIyMjcyOA==]
(No. 1:21-cv-01516)).

The lawsuit against the Office of the Director of National
Intelligence was filed after it failed to respond to a March 11, 2021,
FOIA request for all reports and records of communication dating back
to June 1, 2017, regarding the Wuhan Institute of Virology and/or the
origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus.

On April 30, 2020, the Office of the Director of National Intelligence
issued a press release
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=25115&F=T&]
stating, “The entire Intelligence Community has been consistently
providing critical support to U.S. policymakers and those responding
to the COVID-19 virus, which originated in China.”

The lawsuit against the State Department was filed after it failed to
respond to a March 10, 2021, FOIA request that asked for:

* All cables/teletypes, emails, or other messages sent or received
by any official or employee of the Department of State assigned to the
U.S. Embassy in Beijing or any Consulate in China related to the Wuhan
Institute of Virology and/or the origins of the SARSCoV-2 virus.
* All records regarding meetings between any official, employee, or
representative of the Department of State and any official, employee,
or representative of the Wuhan Institute of Virology, including
briefing materials, notes, reports, or other records related to any
such meeting.
* All records related to former Secretary Pompeo’s appearance on
ABC’s “This Week” in May 2020 [during which he discussed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=25116&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hYmNuZXdzLmdvLmNvbS9Qb2xpdGljcy93ZWVrLXRyYW5zY3JpcHQtMjAtbWlrZS1wb21wZW8tZ292LW1pa2UtZGV3aW5lL3N0b3J5P2lkPTcwNDc4NDQyJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjExMjIyNzI4]
concerns about the Chinese government’s handling of the COVID

We don’t trust either the Biden administration or the Deep State to

On March 1, we uncovered

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=22266&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlhaWQubmloLmdvdi9hYm91dC9oLWNsaWZmb3JkLWxhbmUtbWQtYmlvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjExMjIyNzI4]

In October 2020, we uncovered HHS records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=21023&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmF1Y2ktZW1haWxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYxMTIyMjcyOA==]

against HHS seeking communications between Dr. Anthony Fauci, Lane,

As the country suffered for more than a year, our government was not

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR INFORMATION ON NEW YORK COVID-19 DEATHS

As tragic as the pandemic has been for so many, it was turned into a
nightmare in New York and other states by the inexplicably inept and
cruel actions of the likes of Governor Andrew Cuomo. We aim to find
out the truth about this scandal.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the U.S.
Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for communications
between Centers for Disease Control (CDC) Director Robert Redfield and
New York State and federal government officials regarding COVID-19
deaths reported by New York (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department
of Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=25109&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXJlZGZpZWxkLW55LWNvdmlkLWRlYXRocy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDEyMTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjExMjIyNzI4]
(No.
1:21-cv-01210)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
HHS failed to respond adequately to a March 11, 2021, FOIA request
for:

* All emails sent to and from CDC Director Robert Redfield regarding
the numbers of deaths reported by New York State government officials
due to Covid 19 (also known as SARS-Cov-2 or the novel coronavirus);
and
* [A]ll emails between CDC Director Robert Redfield and other
federal and state government officials with accounts ending in
@cdc.gov and/or @exec.ny.gov, regarding the veracity of official
numbers of deaths reported by New York State government officials due
to Covid 19/SARS-Cov-2.

Earlier this year, we also sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=22381&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY292aWQtbnktcGEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjExMjIyNzI4]
HHS for

procedures during the COVID-19 pandemic.

In January 2020 New York Governor Andrew Cuomo’s administration
was reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=25110&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvbmV3LXlvcmstbnVyc2luZy1ob21lLWNvcm9uYXZpcnVzLWRlYXRocy1hNmMyMTRmNDQ2Nzk3NmVmZGZjYTliYTc1ZjhhZGFlZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYxMTIyMjcyOA==]
to
have “confirmed thousands more nursing home residents died of
COVID-19 than the state’s official tallies had previously
acknowledged,” and according to New York Attorney General Letitia
James, “the nursing home death count could be off by about 50%.”

On April 28, 2021, _The New York Times_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55901&L=25112&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMS8wNC8yOC9ueXJlZ2lvbi9jdW9tby1haWRlcy1udXJzaW5nLWhvbWUtZGVhdGhzLmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MTEyMjI3Mjg=]
reported:

The effort by Gov. Andrew M. Cuomo’s office to obscure the pandemic
death toll in New York nursing homes was far greater than previously
known, with aides repeatedly overruling state health officials over a
span of at least five months, according to interviews and newly
unearthed documents.

***

The Cuomo administration’s handling of nursing home death data now
is the subject of a federal investigation, one of at least four
overlapping inquiries into the governor and his administration. As of
this month, more than 15,500 nursing home residents with Covid-19
have died.
We have little confidence that Gov. Cuomo’s corrupt political allies
in DC and NY will do a competent investigation of his nursing home
scandal. This new lawsuit aims to allow the American people to find
out now, not years from now, what Gov. Cuomo is hiding.

Until next week ...
